d: ONIC PH vs Aurora PH hari ini bener-bener pertandingan kelas dunia. Dua tim mantan juara dunia ketemu di satu panggung dan langsung kasih tontonan yang bikin jantung nggak aman. War tanpa takut, setup rapi, outplay demi outplay, sampai momentum game yang terus berubah bikin match ini terasa kayak grand final lebih cepat 😭🔥 ONIC PH nunjukin kenapa mereka masih jadi salah satu tim paling ditakuti di scene MLBB, sementara Aurora PH juga nggak mau kalah dan terus kasih perlawanan sengit di setiap teamfight. Macro, mekanik, objektif, sampai draft pick semuanya bener-bener level tertinggi. Ini bukan sekadar match biasa, ini bentrokan dua tim elite Filipina yang pernah berdiri di puncak dunia 🌎⚔️ Kalau ada yang bilang region PH adalah region paling kuat di MLBB, match hari ini jadi salah satu bukti nyatanya. Penonton dimanjain sama gameplay disiplin tapi tetap brutal, war panjang, comeback moment, dan mental baja dari kedua tim. Respect buat ONIC PH dan Aurora PH karena udah kasih salah satu series paling seru musim ini 👏🔥#MLBBALLSTAR #MLBBTidalFishing #MLBBDreadsea #MLBB #MobileLegendsBangBang
zh: ONIC PH对阵Aurora PH今天打出了真正的世界级对决，两支前世界冠军同台竞技，奉献了一场让人心跳不止的比赛，团战无畏、阵型严整、outplay不断，节奏反复拉扯堪比大决赛。ONIC PH展示了他们为何仍是MLBB最令人生畏的队伍，Aurora PH也顽强抗争毫不示弱。宏观、操作、目标、BP全部拉满，这不是普通的比赛，是两支站上过世界之巅的菲律宾顶级战队的碰撞。如果有人说PH赛区是MLBB最强赛区，今天这场比赛就是最好的证明。观众享受到了纪律严明又凶狠无比的对局、长达数回合的团战、翻盘时刻以及双方的钢铁意志。向ONIC PH和Aurora PH致敬，带来了本赛季最精彩的系列赛之一。

zh: 再见，Rec Room——Rec Room是一款免费在线多人游戏，玩家可创建、探索并与全球玩家一起游玩。支持自定义形象，可参与彩弹射击、激光对战、任务和密室逃脱等活动，最受欢迎的功能之一是用创意工具自建房间和游戏。游戏支持VR头显、电脑、主机和手机，方便好友跨平台同玩

d: IUDear : to Dear You is a historical narrative open-city adventure set in 17th century Ayutthaya, Siam.  Follow May Sophee, a modern woman who finds herself transported back in time, only to discover that fate has not changed as much as she hoped.  Explore a living historical city inspired by real-world Ayutthaya, meet people from different cultures, uncover stories, and experience everyday life along the waterways of one of Southeast Asia's greatest historical capitals.  Developed in Unreal Engine 5. #IUDear #indiegameame #unrealengine5gine5 #ayutthayathailandhaya #historical #ThaiGame
zh: IUDear：《致亲爱的你》是一款以17世纪暹罗大城为背景的历史叙事开放城市冒险游戏。跟随现代女性May Sophee穿越回古代，却发现命运并未如她所愿改变。探索以真实大城为灵感的历史城市，结识不同文化背景的人们，挖掘故事，体验东南亚最伟大历史都城之一水道旁的日常生活。采用虚幻引擎5开发

d: In this video, I’m going to show you how I architected my underwater robot’s electrical system! 🤖 Everything is networked using Ethernet, with an ESP32 serving as the ROV’s brain, an Ethernet camera board acting as its eyes, a depth sensor for real time telemetry, three brushless motors for control, and high powered LEDs to light up the depths. We’ll then connect to the submarine using a specialized neutrally buoyant Ethernet cable connected to an old router I found. All control and video code is built on Node.js to enable a simple browser-based command center. Follow along to see how I assemble this monstrosity!  #engineering #diy #electronics
zh: 本视频将介绍我的水下机器人电气系统架构：使用以太网组网，ESP32作为ROV的主控，以太网摄像头模块作为视觉，深度传感器实时采集遥测数据，三个无刷电机负责控制，高功率LED照明深水环境。通过一根特制中性浮力以太网线连接旧路由器与潜水器通信，所有控制与视频代码基于Node.js构建，实现简洁的浏览器操控界面。

d: This is officially the best Backrooms game ever made. 💀 The creators of this specific Roblox experience managed to capture pure psychological horror without relying on cheap tricks. The infinite, yellow-walled corridors feel genuinely endless, the hum-buzz of the fluorescent lights is completely deafening, and the procedural generation means you are never truly safe. Watch until the absolute end to see the exact frame where the level shifted and left me entirely disoriented! 😱 glitchy nightmare. #fyp #gaming #viral #backrooms
zh: 这绝对是有史以来最好的后室游戏。这款Roblox体验的创作者在不依靠廉价手段的情况下实现了纯粹的心理恐怖。无尽的黄墙走廊令人窒息，荧光灯的嗡嗡声震耳欲聋，程序生成机制让你永远无法真正安全。一定要看到最后，见证那个让我彻底迷失方向的画面！噩梦般的故障体验。

d: No Other Game Does This Inside a Mech… Beta Decay Is Built Different 🔥 Most games: press one button, pilot mech. Beta Decay: manually flip every switch, pull every lever, boot every single system by hand before that thing even moves. And that's just the mech. You're also building starships from scratch, managing power grids and life support, running from permadeath, and gambling on a space stock market while betraying the same factions you just joined. Already voted Top 100 Indie Game of the Year on IndieDB - twice, and it's not even out yet. ##videogame #betadecaygame #indiegame
zh: 没有任何游戏能在机甲内做到这些——《Beta Decay》与众不同。大多数游戏按一个键驾驶机甲，而《Beta Decay》要求你手动拨动每个开关、拉动每根操纵杆、逐一启动所有系统才能让机甲动起来。这还只是机甲部分。你还要从零建造星舰、管理电网和生命维持系统、承受永久死亡的压力，同时在太空股市上赌博并背刺你刚加入的阵营。已两度在IndieDB年度独立游戏百强榜上入选，而游戏甚至还未发售。

d: This Survival Game Lets You Play as Insects | The Undergrowth Survive as creatures like ants, tarantulas, and mantises in a brutal online ecosystem where predators, food shortages, and other players constantly shape the world around you. #TheUndergrowth #SurvivalGames #PvPGames #IndieGame #Gaming
zh: 这款生存游戏让你扮演昆虫——《The Undergrowth》。以蚂蚁、狼蛛、螳螂等生物身份生存于残酷的在线生态系统中，天敌、食物短缺与其他玩家时刻塑造着你周围的世界。

d: Teror Pocong Begal Bikin Warga Takut Keluar Malam! 😱 Konon, ada sosok misterius yang terbungkus kain kafan putih sambil membawa celurit atau parang panjang yang muncul tepat tengah malam. Sosok ini dikenal warga dengan sebutan Pocong Begal. Ceritanya, ia sering mengetuk pintu rumah warga dan meneror siapa saja yang melintas sendirian di jalan sepi pada malam hari. Sejak kisah ini menyebar, banyak warga menjadi lebih waspada. Jalanan yang biasanya ramai mulai sepi saat malam tiba karena masyarakat takut bertemu sosok misterius tersebut. Namun hingga kini, cerita tentang Pocong Begal masih menjadi perbincangan dan belum tentu dapat dipastikan kebenarannya. Ada yang menganggapnya sekadar cerita warga, ada juga yang percaya kejadian tersebut benar-benar terjadi. pocong begal, cerita horor, misteri malam hari, kisah viral, cerita warga, teror pocong, fakta atau mitos, cerita seram, berita viral, kisah misterius #PocongBegal  #CeritaHoror  #MisteriMalam  #ViralIndonesia  #KisahMisterius
zh: 裹尸布鬼劫匪恐吓让居民不敢出门！据说有一个身裹白色裹尸布、手持镰刀或长砍刀的神秘身影在午夜出没，被当地居民称为"裹尸布鬼劫匪"。据说它常常敲响民宅房门，并恐吓深夜独自行走于偏僻道路上的人。此事传开后，当地居民愈发警惕，往日热闹的街道夜间也变得冷清。然而迄今为止，有关裹尸布鬼劫匪的故事真实性仍无法确认，有人认为只是传言，也有人相信确有其事。

d: Pocong jadi-jadian yang ramai diperbincangkan di Jawa terungkap sudah  ternyata sekelompok anak ("bocil") atau remaja yang iseng berdandan menjadi "pocong jadi-jadian" untuk membuat konten video viral atau prank sedang marak di berbagai daerah di Pulau Jawa, termasuk Jawa Timur, Jawa Tengah, dan Tangerang. Aksi ini sangat meresahkan karena membuat warga ketakutan. Aparat kepolisian di berbagai daerah (seperti di Sragen dan Pati) telah mengamankan puluhan remaja dan pelajar yang melakukan aksi pocong keliling saat tengah malam.  Sebagian besar pelaku melakukan aksi ini demi mengejar views dan popularitas di media sosial dengan melakukan siaran langsung atau membuat video. Selain untuk konten, isu pocong jadi-jadian terkadang disalahgunakan oleh pihak yang tak bertanggung jawab sebagai modus kejahatan dan perampokan rumah, Pihak kepolisian mengimbau para remaja untuk tidak membuat konten menakutkan yang dapat mengganggu keamanan, memicu kepanikan warga, dan membahayakan keselamatan diri sendiri. #terorpocong. #terorpocongjadijadiaan
zh: 在爪哇引发广泛讨论的假裹尸布鬼事件已经水落石出——原来是一群小孩或青少年出于恶作剧目的，扮成裹尸布鬼制作病毒视频或整蛊内容，此类行为正在爪哇岛各地蔓延，包括东爪哇、中爪哇和唐格朗。此举严重扰民，引发居民恐慌。各地警方（如斯拉根、帕蒂等地）已陆续拘留数十名深夜身着裹尸布装扮游荡的青少年和学生。大多数肇事者的目的是通过直播或发布视频追求流量和网络人气。此外，假裹尸布鬼事件有时也被不法分子利用为入室盗窃的犯罪手段。警方提醒青少年不要制作令人恐惧的内容，以免扰乱社会治安、引发居民恐慌并危及自身安全。

d: Reacting to another terrifying Pocong sighting… and this one feels way too real 😳 For anyone who doesn’t know, the Pocong (aka the “shrouded ghost”) is one of the scariest spirits in Indonesian & Malaysian folklore. Legend says it’s the soul of someone whose burial shroud was never released… trapped, wrapped, and restless. They’re said to hop, not walk — bound by the cloth — appearing pale, bruised, and silent. If you ever hear knocking at night or see one watching from a distance… run. 👻 This clip is going viral right now, and honestly, the movement in the background gave me chills. Real or staged? You decide. #fyp #creepy #scarytiktoks #scary #horrortok

I came across another terrifying video showing what locals believe to be a Pocong — one of the scariest ghosts in Indonesian and Malaysian folklore. The Pocong is said to be the restless spirit of someone whose burial shroud was never untied after death. In Islamic tradition, the body is wrapped tightly in white cloth, and if the ties at the head or feet aren’t released after 40 days, the soul can’t move on. That’s when the Pocong rises… hopping from grave to grave, its face pale and eyes sunken, searching for someone to help free it — or to take revenge. Some say it smells like rotting flowers before it appears. Others claim you’ll hear a faint hopping sound outside your window before it shows itself. Whether this clip is real or fake, there’s something unsettling about how it moves… Do you think this video caught a real Pocong or something else entirely? 👀 #fyp #scary #creepy #horrortok #scarytiktoks

d: 🎬 Dancing Village: The Curse Begins (2024) returns to one of Indonesia's most haunting folklore legends, where a simple village visit turns into a supernatural nightmare. The story follows a group of students who travel to a remote village for a cultural program, unaware of the strict rules they must follow. When those rules are broken, they unknowingly awaken an ancient curse tied to spirits that demand respect-and punishment for those who don't obey. Blending cultural mythology with slow-building dread, Dancing Village: The Curse Begins creates horror through ritual, atmosphere, and the fear of crossing unseen boundaries. The terror grows as the line between the human world and the spirit realm begins to fade, making escape nearly impossible. Dark, eerie, and deeply rooted in folklore, it proves that some traditions exist for a reason-and breaking them comes at a terrifying cost. . . . . . . . #horrormovies#foryou#fypシ゚        #horrorstory#strangerclips4u

d: Penampskan Kuntilanak Diatas Pohon Nangka Kuntilanak adalah sosok hantu perempuan dalam cerita rakyat Indonesia, khususnya di Jawa, Sumatra, dan Kalimantan. Ia sering digambarkan berambut panjang, berpakaian putih, dan wajahnya pucat. Konon, kuntilanak adalah arwah wanita yang meninggal saat hamil atau melahirkan, dan belum tenang. Ciri khasnya adalah tawa melengking dan kehadirannya sering ditandai dengan bau bunga kamboja. Ia dipercaya suka muncul di malam hari, bertengger di pohon, terutama pohon pisang, dan bisa menyerupai wanita cantik untuk menyesatkan orang. Meski menyeramkan, kisah tentang kuntilanak juga sering dijadikan bagian dari budaya lisan untuk mengajarkan nilai moral atau sekadar hiburan dalam bentuk cerita horor.
zh: 坎蒂拉娜克出现在菠萝蜜树上——坎蒂拉娜克是印度尼西亚民间故事中的女鬼形象，尤其流传于爪哇、苏门答腊和加里曼丹。她通常被描绘为长发、白衣、面色苍白。据说坎蒂拉娜克是死于难产或分娩的女性亡灵，死后不得安宁。其标志性特征是尖锐的笑声，出现时常伴随鸡蛋花的香气。据信她喜欢在夜间出没，栖息于树上，尤其是香蕉树，还能化身美女迷惑路人。尽管令人毛骨悚然，关于坎蒂拉娜克的故事也常作为口头文化的一部分，用于传授道德观念或作为恐怖故事娱乐大众。

d: Kuntilanak adalah sebutan untuk hantu perempuan yang sangat populer dalam di Indonesia, khususnya di daerah Jawa dan sebagian besar daerah di Indonesia. Dalam berbagai cerita, kuntilanak digambarkan sebagai roh wanita yang meninggal saat melahirkan atau dalam kondisi hamil, dan seringkali digambarkan sebagai sosok yang pendendam dan mengganggu manusia. Kuntilanak seringkali dikaitkan dengan berbagai mitos dan cerita horor, seperti sosok yang memiliki suara tertawa melengking yang menyeramkan, atau sosok yang sering muncul di area yang sunyi dan gelap. Selain itu, dalam beberapa cerita, kuntilanak juga digambarkan sebagai sosok yang bisa menampakkan wujud fisik, seperti sosok wanita dengan pakaian putih dan rambut panjang yang berantakan. Asal-usul kuntilanak sangat bervariasi, namun umumnya diyakini bahwa kuntilanak adalah roh wanita yang meninggal karena melahirkan atau keguguran dan tidak bisa tenang setelah kematiannya.Ada yang punya pengalaman mistis sama sosok satu ini👀 #Viralmedia #Trendsmedia #Horror #HorrrorVideos #Dagelanmistis #Mistismedia #Creepy #Ceritamistis #Ceritaseram
h: viralmedia, trendsmedia, horror, horrrorvideos, dagelanmistis, mistismedia, creepy, ceritamistis, ceritaseram
zh: 坎蒂拉娜克是印尼最广为人知的女鬼，尤其盛行于爪哇等地区。据各类故事描述，她是死于分娩或妊娠期间的女性亡灵，常被塑造为充满怨恨、骚扰人类的形象。她与众多恐怖传说相关，如发出令人毛骨悚然的尖笑声，或出没于幽暗僻静之处。部分故事中她还会现出实体，化为一个白衣长发散乱的女子。坎蒂拉娜克的起源说法各异，但普遍认为她是死于难产或流产、死后无法安息的女性亡灵。有人有过与她相关的灵异经历吗？

d: น่ากลัวสุดขั้ว...หลอนสมองตึงสุดขีด นี่สิ #หนังผี ของจริง!! #ผีเข้า คือส่วนผสมของ "The Wailing"(2016) , "The Innkeepers" (2011) และ "The Skeleton Key" (2005) หยังยั่วล้อคนดูด้วย "เสียง" และ "ภาพ" ได้อย่างชาญฉลาด...รู้ว่าตรงไหนควรบิ้ว ตรงไหนควรเงียบ หาได้ยากมากในยุคที่หนังผีแห่ประโคมซาวด์จนหูแทบแตกและสาดใส่ฉากตุ้งแช่แบบผิวเผิน แต่สำหรับเรื่องนี้...การมีอยู่ของ "ผี" กลับเสียดสีสังคมได้อย่างแนบเนียน ในโลกจะมีคนอยู่สามประเภท "ไม่เชื่อเลย" / "คิดว่าเชื่อ" และ "เชื่อหมดใจ"   ซึ่งหนังได้หยิบนำมุมมองของคนทั้ง 3 แบบนี้มาผูกปมเป็นจนเป็นบทที่ดูแล้วงงเป็นไก่ตาแตก ก่อนจะตกตะกอนในเวลาต่อมาสักครึ่งชั่วโมงและพบว่า....มันโคตรสุดยอดไปเลยจริงๆครับ มีซ้ำรอบสองแน่นอนเพราะยังมีปมที่ค้างคาใจให้ค้นหาอีกหลายจุด กล้าพูดได้เต็มปากว่านี่แหล่ะ "หนังผีที่ดี"  ไปดูครับ ขอแนะนำเป็นที่สุด!! ....เข้าฉาย 21 พฤษภาคมนี้ในโรงภาพยนตร์เท่านั้น #รีวิว #หนัง #ไทบ้าน ป.ล.หนังไม่ไเกี่ยวกับจักรวาล " #ไทบ้านเดอะซีรี่ส์" นะครับ...แค่อยู่ในค่ายและทีมโปรดักชั่นเดียวกันเฉยๆ เรื่องนี้ไม่มีตลกมีแต่หลอน กับ หลอนโคตรๆ
h: หนังผี, ผีเข้า, รีวิว, หนัง, ไทบ้าน, ไทบ้านเดอะซีรี่ส์
zh: 极致恐惧……烧脑惊悚到极限，这才是真货！融合了《哭声》(2016)、《旅馆守护者》(2011)与《骷髅钥匙》(2005)的精髓，巧妙地用"声音"和"画面"撩拨观众，知道何时该蓄势、何时该沉默。在鬼片泛滥、音效震耳欲聋、Jump Scare粗糙滥用的时代，这样的作品实属难得。片中"鬼"的存在以细腻的方式讽刺社会——世界上有三种人："完全不信"、"以为自己信"和"全心相信"，电影将三种视角编织成令人看得一头雾水的剧情，但半小时后沉淀下来，才发现……真的绝了。必定二刷，因为还有许多悬念值得细细探寻。敢说这就是"好鬼片"，强烈推荐！5月21日起限定院线上映。附注：本片与"某宇宙"无关，只是同一片厂和制作团队而已。片中没有搞笑，只有吓、和极致的吓。

d: 😶 บ้านหลังนี้ไม่ได้หลอนเพราะเสียงเล่า แต่มันหลอนเพราะ “ประวัติ” ที่ซ้อนอยู่ 3 ชั้นความลับของบ้านบรรทมสินธุ์ 1️⃣ ชั้นแรก คือความงาม อาคารสีเหลือง โดมสูง สระน้ำ สะพาน และสวนที่ดูเหมือนฉากหนัง 2️⃣ ชั้นที่สอง คืออำนาจ บ้านพระราชทานจากรัชกาลที่ 6 ต่อมากลายเป็นพื้นที่สำคัญของรัฐ 3️⃣ ชั้นสุดท้าย คือข่าวลือ หลายคนจำบ้านหลังนี้จากเรื่องลี้ลับ แต่หลักฐานจริงยืนยันได้มากที่สุดคือ ประวัติศาสตร์ สถาปัตยกรรม และบทบาททางการเมือง ━ บ้านบรรทมสินธุ์จึงไม่ใช่แค่บ้านเก่า แต่มันคือสถานที่ที่ความงาม ความเงียบ และอำนาจ อยู่ในกรอบภาพเดียวกัน ━ ดูให้จบ แล้วคุณอาจมองบ้านพิษณุโลกไม่เหมือนเดิม ━ #บ้านบรรทมสินธุ์ #บ้านพิษณุโลก #บ้านเก่าเล่าเรื่อง #ประวัติศาสตร์ลี้ลับ #ประวัติศาสตร์ไทย #สถาปัตยกรรมไทย #สถานที่ลึกลับ #บ้านพักนายก #รัชกาลที่6 #KLLMystery
an: โคตรลี้ลับ - บันทึกลับทั่วโลก
zh: 这栋房子令人毛骨悚然，不是因为传闻中的声音，而是因为层层叠叠的"历史"——班通辛府邸的三层秘密：第一层是美丽，黄色建筑、高穹顶、水池、桥梁和如电影场景般的花园；第二层是权力，由拉玛六世御赐，后成为重要的国家场所；第三层是传言，许多人因灵异故事记住这里，但真正有据可查的是历史、建筑与政治角色。班通辛府邸不只是一栋老宅，而是美丽、宁静与权力共存于同一画框的地方。看完之后，你或许会用不同的眼光看待披耶路上的那栋宅邸。

d: เกือบ 40 ปีใต้บาดาล... มีความลับอะไรซ่อนอยู่? พาไปดู "เมืองลับแห่งสังขละบุรี" ที่โผล่พ้นน้ำให้เราเห็นแค่ปีละครั้ง!  ▫️ ▫️ จากศูนย์รวมใจชาวมอญ สู่ซากปรักหักพังใต้น้ำสุดขลังที่ท้าทายกาลเวลา คุณอยากไปเห็นตอนที่มันหลับใหลอยู่ใต้น้ำ หรือตอนที่มันตื่นขึ้นมารับแสงตะวัน? ▫️ ▫️ #โคตรลี้ลับ #เมืองบาดาล #สังขละบุรี #UnseenThailand #เรื่องลึกลับ #สารคดี
an: โคตรลี้ลับ - บันทึกลับทั่วโลก
zh: 沉睡水底近40年……藏着什么秘密？带你探访"桑卡武里隐秘之城"——每年只浮出水面一次！从孟族人的精神中心，到水下神秘废墟，挑战着岁月的流逝。你想在它沉睡水底时去看，还是在它苏醒迎接阳光时去看？

d: ประตูนี้เคยเห็นคนออกศึก เคยเห็นกองคาราวาน และยังเห็นคนโคราชเดินผ่านทุกวัน 🕯️ ━ 4 ชั้นความลับของประตูชุมพล 1) ชั้นสงคราม คือประตูรวมพลก่อนออกศึก 2) ชั้นการค้า คือทางผ่านของผู้คนและสินค้า 3) ชั้นความเชื่อ คือการลอดเพื่อกลับมาโคราชอีกครั้ง 4) ชั้นความทรงจำ คือจุดที่ย่าโม เมืองเก่า และคนโคราชเชื่อมกัน ━ นี่ไม่ใช่เรื่องลี้ลับแบบไม่มีหลักฐาน แต่มันคือประวัติศาสตร์ที่ถูกซ่อนไว้กลางเมือง ━ #ประตูชุมพล #ย่าโม #เมืองโคราช #โคราชบ้านเอ็ง #ประวัติศาสตร์ไทยน่ารู้ #เที่ยวเชิงประวัติศาสตร์ #นครราชสีมา #เรื่องลึกลับ

zh: 这扇门曾目送将士出征、商队往来，至今仍见着呵叻人每天走过。春蓬城门的四层秘密：1）战争层——出征前的集结之门；2）贸易层——人与货物的必经之路；3）信仰层——穿越城门以祈平安归来；4）记忆层——连结阿嬷雕像、古城与呵叻人的地方。这不是无据可查的灵异故事，而是藏在城市中央的历史。

d: ถ้ำนี้มีแสงลอดลงมาเหมือนฉากหนัง แต่เบื้องหลังไม่ใช่เรื่องบังเอิญ 🔍⛰️ ━ 5 เรื่องที่หลายคนไม่รู้เกี่ยวกับถ้ำเขาหลวง: 1. ตั้งอยู่ที่ ต.ธงชัย อ.เมือง จ.เพชรบุรี 2. เป็นหนึ่งในถ้ำสำคัญของเมืองเพชร 3. จุดเด่นคือปล่องแสงบนเพดานถ้ำ 4. ภายในมีทั้งพระพุทธรูป เจดีย์ และหินงอกหินย้อย 5. ความงามของที่นี่เกิดจากธรรมชาติ ศรัทธา และประวัติศาสตร์รวมกัน ━ เซฟไว้ก่อนมา เพราะถ้ารู้เรื่องนี้ก่อนเดินลงถ้ำ ทุกมุมที่เห็นจะลึกกว่าคำว่า “สวย” ━ #ถ้ำเขาหลวง #เพชรบุรี #เที่ยวเพชรบุรี #ถ้ำสวย #แสงธรรมชาติ #วัดในถ้ำ #ประวัติศาสตร์เพชรบุรี #เที่ยวไทยไม่ตกเทรนด์ #สถานที่ลึกลับในไทย #โคตรลี้ลับ

zh: 这座洞穴的光线穿透而下，宛如电影场景，但背后并非偶然。关于考銮洞，许多人不知道的五件事：1. 位于碧武里府孟县塔昌猜区；2. 是碧武里重要洞穴之一；3. 特色是洞顶的天然光孔；4. 洞内有佛像、佛塔和钟乳石；5. 此地之美源于自然、信仰与历史的融合。收藏好再来，因为提前了解这些，走入洞穴后看到的每个角落都将远不止"美丽"二字。

d: #creepy #aswang #zombie #scary #horror

Reyna Manalo observed a creature from her window at approximately 10 PM, in the Pampanga Province in the Philippines. Regional documentation  identifies the creature as an Aswang — a shape-shifting entity. Reyna stated, “It was as if it was looking right into my soul with those yellow beady eyes.” The creature was standing upright outside her window and appeared to be gesturing for her to come outside. Reyna applied a traditional coconut oil preparation reported in regional documentation to have protective properties against Aswang contact. The beast retreated shortly after the oil was administered. #aswang #philippines #folklore #cryptid #paranormal
zh: 蕾娜·马纳洛在菲律宾邦板牙省晚上约十点从窗口目睹一只生物，当地记录将其认定为变形实体阿斯旺。她描述道："它仿佛直视着我的灵魂，一双黄色的小眼睛死盯着我。"该生物直立站在窗外，似乎在招手示意她出去。蕾娜涂抹了一种据记载可抵御阿斯旺侵扰的传统椰子油，随后怪物退走。

d: Not horror. Not myth. In the Philippines, people still whisper “tabi-tabi po” before passing an old tree. Engkanto aren’t ghosts — they’re guardians of the land. 🌿 Pre-colonial stories said they protected balance between humans and nature — long before the Spanish called them demons. Some legends never die… they just evolve #Engkanto #PhilippineMythology #FilipinoFolklore #PinoyCulture #TabiTabiPo
zh: 不是恐怖故事，也不是神话。在菲律宾，人们经过老树前仍会低语"借过了"。恩坎托不是鬼魂，而是大地的守护者。殖民前的传说说它们维护着人与自然的平衡，远早于西班牙人将其称为恶魔之前。有些传说永不消亡，只是不断演变。

d: Locals in Canlaon City, Negros Oriental, tell that the Century Tree is enchanted and inhabited by spirits or engkanto (mythical beings in Philippine folklore). According to stories passed down by elders: The tree is said to be protected by nature spirits, and anyone who disrespects it — by cutting its branches or taking its roots — may suffer misfortune or illness. Visitors often leave offerings like coins, food, or candles as a sign of respect. Some locals believe the tree serves as a gateway between the spirit world and the human world, a sacred place where nature and the divine meet. People claim to hear whispers, rustling sounds, or feel a strange energy when standing under it, even when the air is still.  #canlaon #foryoupage
zh: 菲律宾东内格罗斯省坎劳恩市当地人称，那棵百年大树被恩坎托精灵附身守护。据长辈世代相传：砍枝或取根者将遭厄运或生病。访客常留下硬币、食物或蜡烛表示敬意。有人相信此树是灵界与人界的通道，是自然与神圣相遇的圣地。即使风平浪静，站在树下也能听到低语、沙沙声或感受到奇异的能量。

d: A Mangkukulam is a Filipino witch or sorcerer known for practicing kulam, a form of traditional folk magic or black magic in the Philippines. Rooted deeply in pre-colonial beliefs, the mangkukulam is feared for their ability to inflict curses, illness, misfortune, or even death often from afar using rituals, spells, and cursed objects. #mythology #mystery #myth #mangkukulam #witch
zh: 蛊师（Mangkukulam）是菲律宾的女巫或术士，以施行kulam（一种菲律宾传统民间魔法或黑魔法）著称。蛊师根植于前殖民时期的信仰，以能从远处通过仪式、咒语和诅咒物品施加诅咒、疾病、厄运乃至死亡而令人畏惧。

d: "Mangkukulam" In Philippine folklore, a mangkukulam is a person, often depicted as a witch, who practices kulam, a form of black magic or witchcraft, and can cast spells or curses on others. They are known for using rituals, potions, and even voodoo dolls to inflict harm, illness, or misfortune on their victims. While often associated with negative actions, some mangkukulam are also believed to use their powers for healing or herbal magic, similar to an albularyo (witch doctor). #Mangkukulam #Philippines #Horror #Monster #Trending #Viral #AI #Veo3 #FYP
h: mangkukulam, philippines, horror, monster, trending, viral, ai, veo3, fyp
zh: 在菲律宾民间传说中，蛊师是一种通常被描绘为女巫的人，修行kulam（一种黑魔法或巫术），能对他人施咒或降下诅咒。他们以使用仪式、药剂甚至巫毒娃娃对受害者造成伤害、疾病或厄运而闻名。虽然常与负面行为相关联，但也有部分蛊师被认为会用其力量治愈疾病或施行草药魔法，类似于草药医师（albularyo）。

d: This one’s gonna piss people off. Good. We’ve reached a point where personal accountability gets replaced with inherited guilt, and if you refuse to play along, suddenly you’re the problem. I said what I said. You are responsible for YOUR actions. Not the sins of dead people. Not performative outrage. Not social media loyalty tests designed to make people kneel for approval. Respect is earned and given individually—not assigned by race, politics, or guilt campaigns. If that truth offends you, ask yourself why. The comments should be an absolute war zone on this one. 👇 If you’re done being told what you’re supposed to feel, drop your take below. #truth #realtalk #culture #debate #conservative
zh: 这条会惹怒一些人，很好。我们已经到了这样一个地步：个人责任被集体原罪取代，你若不肯配合，突然就成了问题所在。我说的就是这个意思——你只对自己的行为负责，而不是为死去的人赎罪，不是表演式愤怒，不是为了博得认可而下跪的社交媒体忠诚测试。尊重是靠个人赢得和给予的，不是按种族、政治或愧疚运动分配的。如果这个真相冒犯了你，问问自己为什么。评论区应该会炸锅，说出你的看法。

d: Sinopsis: Seorang siswa SMA yang ceria dan penuh semangat jatuh cinta pada pandangan pertama dengan seorang siswi yang dikenal dingin dan sulit didekati. Meski berkali-kali ditolak dengan tegas, ia tidak menyerah dan terus melakukan berbagai upaya unik serta konyol untuk meluluhkan hati sang "dewi" sekolah. Di tengah dinamika persahabatan remaja yang penuh tawa dan drama, akankah ketulusannya mampu meruntuhkan tembok pertahanan sang gadis, ataukah cinta ini hanya akan menjadi kenangan masa sekolah yang bertepuk sebelah tangan? A cheerful and energetic high school student falls in love at first sight with a girl known for her cold and distant personality. Despite being rejected multiple times, he refuses to give up and continues to try unique and hilarious ways to melt the "school goddess's" heart. Amidst the dynamics of teenage friendships filled with laughter and drama, will his sincerity manage to break down her walls, or will this love just become a one-sided memory of their school days? #LoveRevolution #ParkJiHoon #LeeRuby #YoungHoon #TheBoyz #RekomendasiDrakor #SchoolRomance #WebDrama #KdramaEdit #DrakorSeru #DramaKorea #GongJuYoung #WangJaRim #FypIndonesia #GlobalFyp #AsianDrama
zh: 简介：一个开朗热情的高中男生对全校公认冷漠难接近的"校花"一见钟情。尽管屡次遭到拒绝，他仍不放弃，用各种奇葩又搞笑的方式试图融化她的心。在充满欢笑与drama的青春友情中，他的真诚究竟能否打破她的心墙，还是这段爱终将成为单恋的校园回忆？

d: ​เรื่องนี้เดือดปุดๆ เลยครับพี่ๆ เมื่อคนคุ้นเคยกันมาทำแสบใส่ พี่ "น้ำ รพีภัทร" ถึงกับทนไม่ไหว ต้องออกมาแฉ "นัท มหาเทพ" ผู้จัดงานเตะบอลดารา ที่รับเงินเจ้าภาพมาแล้วแต่กลับเบี้ยวค่าตัวดาราศิลปินซะงั้น งานนี้ไม่ใช่แค่พี่น้ำที่โดนนะครับ พี่ "หนุ่ม ศรราม" และน้า "ต๋อง ชวนชื่น" ก็โดนหางเลขไปด้วย จนพี่หนุ่มต้องขอยกเลิกงานกะทันหันเลยครับ ​เวลาคนเรารักและไว้ใจกัน เรียกกันว่าพี่น้อง แต่มาโดนหักหลังเรื่องเงินทองแบบนี้ มันเสียความรู้สึกจริงๆ ครับ เงินหามาด้วยความเหนื่อยยาก ไม่น่ามาทำกันแบบนี้เลย เก่งเห็นด้วยกับพี่น้ำเลยครับว่าโอกาสมีไว้ให้เฉพาะคนที่คู่ควรเท่านั้น ​" จริง " ครับ เรื่องเงินไม่เข้าใครออกใครจริงๆ... ถ้าเป็นพี่ๆ เจอเพื่อนหรือคนใกล้ตัวมาทำผิดใจเรื่องเงินแบบนี้ พี่ๆ จะจัดการเด็ดขาดแบบพี่น้ำไหมครับ ลองคอมเมนต์มาแชร์ประสบการณ์ให้เก่งฟังหน่อยนะครับ ​#เล่ามาสิ #น้ำรพีภัทร #หนุ่มศรราม #ข่าวดารา #ข่าวบันเทิงวันนี้

zh: 这件事真的闹得很热！熟人竟然使绊子，"Nam Rapeepat"忍无可忍，公开揭发"Nat Mahatep"——明星足球赛主办方收了主办费却拖欠明星和艺人出场费。这次不只是Nam一人受害，"Num Sorn Ram"和"Tong Chuanchuen"也被牵连，导致Num不得不临时取消演出。彼此相亲相爱、以兄弟姐妹相称，却在金钱上遭到背刺，真的很寒心。辛苦赚来的钱，不该这样被对待。我非常认同Nam说的：机会只留给值得的人。钱的事确实不认人……如果你们遇到朋友或身边的人在金钱上这样伤害你，你们会像Nam一样果断处理吗？欢迎在评论区分享经历！#说来听听

d: This scene from Genie, Make a Wish literally changed the whole vibe 😭✨ Ki Ka-young suddenly becomes so soft and caring towards Genie… hugging him, showing love out of nowhere, and acting like she never wants to lose him 🖤 And when she says, “I won’t be able to do this after losing…” THAT scene hit differently 😭💔 The chemistry between Kim Woo-bin and Bae Suzy was honestly unreal in this drama. Every emotional moment felt natural, soft, and painful at the same time. Their expressions, silence, and small gestures made the scene even more beautiful. So I edited this scene with the song “Zalima” and it matched PERFECTLY ✨ The vibe, emotions, slow moments, and romantic tension all synced so well with the audio that it feels like the song was made for this drama 😭🔥 Drama Details 🎬 • Drama: Genie, Make a Wish (2025) • Genre: Fantasy, Romance, Comedy, Emotional • Story: A magical fantasy story about a mysterious Genie and a cold emotionless girl whose life slowly changes after meeting him. d: seanshepard10 The Rock-afire Explosion at ShowBiz Pizza Place - Pensacola, Florida 1991 Snapper, way back in 1991. As a kid he had heard rumors that the show was going away and knew he had to get there and film what he could. Sadly, about two weeks after this was filmed, Concept Unification hit this store and the Rock-afire Explosion show was converted to Munch's Make Believe Band.. #showbizpizzac #chuckecheese #rockafireexplosion #pizzatimetheatre #animatronics
zh: 1991年，佛罗里达州彭萨科拉的Showbiz Pizza Place里的Rock-afire Explosion乐队表演。Snapper早在1991年就听说演出即将停办，于是赶去拍下了能拍到的一切。可惜的是，这段视频拍摄大约两周后，"概念统一"计划波及了这家门店，Rock-afire Explosion演出被改造成了Munch的梦幻乐队。

d: CONCEPT UNIFICATION was a process lasting from June 1990 to 1993, where all ShowBiz Pizza Place locations and the animatronic band housed there, The Rock-afire Explosion, were converted into Chuck E. Cheese's Pizza and Munch's Make Believe Band. This was due to rising tensions between ShowBiz Pizza Time, Inc. and Aaron Fechter, head of Creative Engineering. #chuckecheese #conceptunification #showbiz #90s #animatronics
zh: "概念统一"是一项从1990年6月持续至1993年的改造计划，所有Showbiz Pizza Place门店及其机器人乐队Rock-afire Explosion均被改造为Chuck E. Cheese's Pizza及Munch的梦幻乐队。起因是Showbiz Pizza Time公司与Creative Engineering负责人Aaron Fechter之间矛盾不断激化。

d: Spring Break Day 1 with my babies 🎬🍿 Took the kids to ShowBiz Cinema and we had the BEST time! We went to see Hoopers and it was actually really good. I love this spot because it’s more than just a movie theater. They have a bar for the adults, an arcade for the kids, and family bowling, so it’s really a whole vibe for a family day. If you’re new to Houston and on the north side, definitely check out ShowBiz Cinema! 🎦  #SpringBreakHouston #HoustonMomLife #FamilyFun #thingstodo #springbreakideas
zh: 和宝贝们的春假第一天！带孩子们去了Showbiz Cinema，玩得超开心！我们去看了《Hoopers》，真的很不错。我喜欢这个地方，因为它不只是一家电影院：大人有酒吧，孩子有游戏厅，还有家庭保龄球馆，是家庭出游的绝佳选择。如果你刚搬到休斯顿北区，一定要去看看Showbiz Cinema！

d: El chisme muere cuando llega a oídos sabios. Porque la persona madura no lo alimenta. Lo corta. El chisme necesita reacción. Necesita emoción. Necesita que alguien lo repita. Cuando llega a alguien con carácter, se detiene. No porque no escuche… sino porque no participa. No todo lo que te cuentan merece tu voz. Guárdalo si te representa. Compártelo con quien lo necesita. d: Where was this job option during career day? 🤣 I figured I could share this side of the beauty industry for those who don’t know! While women will have a separate hairstylist and makeup artist (among other glamsquad members), men usually have one professional for their hair, skin, and makeup. Yes, everyone is wearing makeup! The right haircut, facial hair, and styling make a world of difference on the red carpet or a magazine cover 🤩 . . . #celebritybeauty #celebrityhair #celebritymakeup #celebritygroomer
zh: 为什么职业日没有告诉我这份工作？我来介绍一下美妆行业鲜为人知的一面：女明星通常有专属发型师和化妆师，而男明星往往只有一位全能造型师负责发型、护肤和化妆。没错，所有人都化妆！合适的发型、面部修饰和整体造型在红毯或杂志封面上至关重要。

He decides that mommy is exclusively his, leading to an iconic moment where he points at his dad and firmly says, "It's my mommy!" The scene ends with a wholesome family moment of laughter and cuddles. d: Video latihan tari di Sanggar Pradnya Swari, Jembrana, Bali, viral di media sosial. Anak-anak yang berlatih—baik laki-laki maupun perempuan—tampak serius menguasai nyeledet, gerak mata khas dalam tari Bali. Nyeledet bukan sekadar melirik, tetapi gerakan cepat dan tajam yang harus selaras dengan ekspresi wajah, posisi kepala, dan irama gamelan. Teknik ini dikenal sulit karena membutuhkan konsentrasi tinggi serta kontrol otot mata yang kuat. Merujuk kajian seniman dan akademisi tari Bali, I Wayan Dibia, nyeledet menjadi elemen penting dalam membangun karakter tarian seperti Legong dan Kebyar, sekaligus menunjukkan kedalaman ekspresi penari. Dalam video yang beredar, anak-anak tampak berulang kali mengulang gerakan demi mencapai ketepatan. Latihan intens itu menggambarkan proses panjang di balik keindahan tari Bali yang selama ini terlihat memukau di atas panggung. #BALI #videoviral #tari
zh: 巴厘岛Jembrana地区Pradnya Swari舞蹈馆的练习视频在社交媒体上走红。孩子们正在认真练习巴厘舞蹈中标志性的眼部动作"Nyeledet"——这是一种需要与面部表情、头部姿势和甘美兰音乐节奏高度配合的快速而犀利的眼神移动技巧。据巴厘舞蹈艺术家及学者I Wayan Dibia的研究，Nyeledet是Legong、Kebyar等舞蹈塑造角色的核心元素。视频中孩子们反复练习，展现了台上巴厘舞之美背后漫长而艰辛的训练历程。

d: 🔥 TikTok Dance Trends 2026 | Viral Dance Challenges & The Biggest TikTok Dancers Taking Over FYP TikTok dance trends continue to dominate social media in 2026, with millions of users watching viral dance compilations, trending choreography, and dance challenge videos every day. From trending songs and viral transitions to nightclub vibes and influencer dance edits, TikTok has become the biggest platform for discovering new creators and viral entertainment. Whether it’s fast-paced choreography, couple dance trends, hip-hop moves, Afrobeat challenges, Latin dance vibes, K-pop routines, or viral remixes, TikTok dance videos are everywhere on the For You Page (FYP).The biggest TikTok dance creators and influencers are helping shape viral trends every week. d: Tinikling performance at Ambassador in Paradise Resort by the Boracay Folkloric Dance Collective 🇵🇭✨   Once honored as the Philippines’ national dance, Tinikling beautifully imitates the swift and graceful movements of the “tikling” birds as they glide through grass stems and skillfully dodge bamboo traps set by rice farmers.   A vibrant celebration of culture, rhythm, and tradition. 🎶🌾   #Tinikling #FilipinoCulture #Boracay #PhilippineDance #culturalheritage
zh: 博拉卡伊民俗舞蹈团在天堂大使度假村表演竹竿舞。竹竿舞曾被誉为菲律宾国家舞蹈，优美地模仿"竹鸡"鸟滑翔于草茎间、灵巧躲避稻农竹陷阱时矫健优雅的身姿，是文化、韵律与传统的生动庆典。

[[ MONGGO DI SAVE DULU  ]] Ayam suwir sambal matah ini wanginya bukan main… baru diaduk saja sudah bikin lapar duluan! Pedasnya seger, gurihnya nampol, ayamnya nyerap bumbu sampai ke serat-seratnya. Dimakan pakai nasi putih hangat aja sudah bahaya banget… auto nambah terus❤️❤️  #sambal #sambalmatah #kulinerbali #dapurcantikchannel #dekurabaliseasalt  Ayam suwir sambal matah ini rasanya pedas segar, wangi daun jeruk, bawang merahnya keluar banget… tapi gurihnya tetap harus pas.  Makanya Dapur Cantik pakai Garam Dekura. Garam organik dari Kusamba Bali yang rendah natrium dan kaya mineral, jadi rasa masakan tetap gurih umami tanpa terasa terlalu tajam.  Untuk keluarga, terutama yang ada orang tua atau lansia di rumah, memilih garam itu jangan asal. Garam Dekura bisa jadi pilihan garam harian yang lebih bijak, karena lebih ramah untuk pola makan sehari-hari, tapi tetap bikin masakan seenak ayam suwir sambal matah ini.  Gurihnya dapet, segarnya tetap keluar, makan pun jadi lebih nyaman. RESEP  AYAM SUWIR SAMBAL MATAH 1 kg paha ayam potong 1/2 sdt garam 2 sdt gula pasir 1 sdm saus tiram 2 sdt kaldu jamur 2 sdm Air jeruk limau 150ml air  Bahan untuk merebus ayam: 2 ltr air  1 sdt garam dekura 1 batang serai, geprek 8 lembar daun salam 6 lembar daun jeruk purut 1 sdt kaldu jamur 20 gr lengkuas 20 gr jahe Bumbu Iris 200 gr bawang merah 100 gr bawang putih 25 lembar daun jeruk purut 80 gr cabai rawit merah  Happy Cooking  Dapur Cantik channel

d: 𝟑 𝐀𝐟𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐓𝐫𝐲 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐬𝐢𝐚𝐧 𝐅𝐨𝐨𝐝 🇮🇩🇮🇩🇮🇩 • Nasi Goreng “Fried Rice” • Mie Goreng “Fried Noodles” • Nasi Campur “Mixed Rice” If you’re looking to try some traditional Indonesia Food in Bali, I recommend dining at a Warung. The price of these meals can be slightly higher at other restaurants and cafes but still in the affordable range! d: NASI GANDUL 💕 A specialty dish from Pati, Central Java - where my Indonesian grandma is from! This is top-tier street food.  The vendor takes a plate lined with banana leaf, adds hot rice, scissor cuts meat/egg/anything you want on top of the rice, then pours this incredible rich, aromatic, sweet-savory-spicy coconut milk+beef broth soup all over.  SO FREAKIN’ GOOD!!  It’s rare to find Nasi Gandul outside of its originating region, but if you do come across it - try it 😍 #indonesianfood #nasigandul #centraljava #TheMainIngredient #MakanDenganMakna
zh: Nasi Gandul——来自中爪哇Pati的特色菜，街头美食中的顶级存在。米饭铺在香蕉叶上，加入肉/蛋等配料，浇上浓郁香甜的椰奶牛肉汤，非常值得一试

If you love crispy and chewy textures, you’ll love this snack ✨ CIRENG One of the most underrated Indonesian snacks you’ve probably never heard of…​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​ Ingredients: 50 g tapioca flour 2 garlic cloves, grated 1 stalk green onion, finely sliced 1 tsp salt ½ tsp mushroom bouillon ¼ tsp white pepper 250 ml water Mix all together, cook briefly, then transfer to a bowl with 80 g tapioca flour. Knead and add more tapioca flour as needed until the dough comes together. For the sambal: 4 chillies 1 tsp salt 60 g palm sugar 2 tbsp tamarind water Water

Nasi Goreng Gila Obama  📍 Jakarta, Indonesia 🇮🇩 Credits: @berburukuliner.id While most people know that Barack Obama spent part of his childhood in Jakarta, few realize he inspired one of the city’s most chaotic street food icons. Located right in the Menteng district near his former school, this legendary stall tackles the impossible nightly task of churning out hundreds of portions from a single, massive wok. The word "Gila" means crazy, and the dish definitely lives up to its reputation. Unlike standard fried rice, this version is all about the overwhelming scale of its toppings. A smoking bed of wok-fried rice is completely smothered in a rich, savory avalanche of sliced meatballs, sausages, scrambled eggs, and shredded cabbage, all heavily spiced and stir-fried together.

d: Nasi Goreng Indonesia - Indonesian Fried Rice #friedrice #easyrecipes #recipe  Ingredients 3 cloves garlic, minced 1 egg 3 cups cooked rice 4 slices fish cake, thinly sliced 4 large prawns, peeled and deveined A handful of fresh squid, cleaned and sliced 1 tbsp light soy sauce 2 tbsp kecap manis (sweet soy sauce) 1 tsp dark caramel sauce 1 tbsp sambal (adjust to taste) Large pinch of YumYum or MSG 1 bird’s eye chili, finely sliced 1 spring onion, thinly sliced 2 tbsp fried garlic Sliced cucumber and tomato, to serve Fried egg, to serve INSTRUCTIONS 1. Heat a wok over high heat and add a splash of oil. Add the minced garlic and stir-fry until fragrant. 2. Crack in the egg and scramble it quickly, breaking it into small pieces as it cooks. 3. Add the cooked rice to the wok and toss thoroughly, breaking up any clumps and ensuring it’s well-coated in the egg and garlic mixture. 4. Add the fish cake, prawns, and squid. Toss everything together and stir-fry until the seafood is cooked through. 5. Mix in the light soy sauce, kecap manis, dark caramel sauce, and sambal. Stir well to evenly coat the rice and proteins with the sauce. 6. Toss in the bird’s eye chili and sliced spring onion. Stir-fry briefly to combine. 7. Sprinkle the fried garlic over the rice and give it one final toss. 8. Serve hot, garnished with sliced cucumber and tomato, and top with a fried egg.
zh: 印尼炒饭食谱：食材：大蒜3瓣切末、鸡蛋1个、熟米饭3杯、鱼饼4片切薄、大虾4只去壳去线、新鲜鱿鱼一把切片、生抽1汤匙、甜酱油2汤匙、深色焦糖酱1茶匙、参巴酱1汤匙（按口味调整）、适量味精、朝天椒1个切细、葱1根切薄、炸蒜末2汤匙、黄瓜和番茄切片配盘、煎蛋配盘。做法：1.热锅倒油，放蒜末爆香。2.打入鸡蛋快速炒散。3.加入米饭翻炒均匀，打散结块。4.加鱼饼、虾和鱿鱼翻炒至熟。5.加入生抽、甜酱油、焦糖酱和参巴酱，翻炒均匀。6.加入朝天椒和葱，快速翻炒。7.撒上炸蒜末翻炒均匀。8.趁热盛盘，配黄瓜、番茄和煎蛋

d: Yes, I've done Ayam Goreng before. And it was delicious, BUT, it was not authentic. This is closer to something you'd really have in Indonesia. The most special part of this dish comes from the little shards of batter made from lemongrass, shallots and other aromats, that act like little garnishes of crunchy onion bhajis. It's seriously stunning.

Mom’s Indonesian Beef Rendang 🇲🇨   What I grew up eating for over 17 years back in my hometown, Indonesia🇲🇨😍. Today, I share this recipe with you, in honor of Indonesia's Independence Day. Happy Independence Day Indonesia, Indonesia MERDEKA! 🇮🇩✨ Ingredients A: 1.4kg of beef, topside or silverside, diced into 4cm chunks 800ml of regular coconut cream 400ml of coconut milk 1 tbsp of chicken powder 1 tbsp of Sugar 2 tsp of salt 2 tbsp of coconut sugar 6 tbsp of vegetable oil for stir fry  Ingredients B, to blend: 15 cloves of garlic  3 medium onions or 250g, chopped 30g of ginger,, cut into small pieces  30g of turmeric, cut into small pieces 6 candlenuts 30g of galangal, cut into small pieces 4 stalks lemongrass, chopped 6 tbsp of vegetable oil, to blend Ingredients C: 5 bay leaves 8 kaffir lime leaves 4 lemongrass, chopped 8 cloves wholes 3 cinnamon sticks 4 cardamoms 4 star anises Seasoning: 2 tsp of cilantro ground 2 tsp of turmeric ground 2 tsp of white pepper 2 tsp of cinnamon powder Steps: 1. Cut the beef into 4cm chunks and do not cut the beef into smaller pieces as they will break down during the cooking. 2. Add all of the Ingredients B in a blender or food processor. Then, blend it or give it a blitz until all the become a thick paste. Set aside 3. In the heavily-bottomed pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. 4. Then, pour the paste (from Ingredients B) into the pan and cook the paste until fragrant for 2 minutes. 5. Add the “Ingredients C” to the pan and stir to mix. 6. Next, add the “Seasoning” and followed by chicken powder, sugar and salt to the pan. Cook the paste until fragrant ( the paste will change color to red-brown ish ) 7. Add the beef to the pan and cook the beef until it is lightly browned.  8. Add coconut milk into the pan and stir to combine. Then, add coconut cream and bring it to simmer. 9. Cover and simmer in low heat for 1 hour until the beef is tender and the sauce thickens. (Stir it periodically to prevent the meat from burning) 10. Once the sauce has thickened and released reddish oil, add coconut sugar and give it a final mix. 11. Cover and simmer for another 30 minutes until it turns into dark brown. 12. Once it is done, enjoy with a bowl of rice! Notes: You should let the meat sit overnight for the flavors to be fully absorbed in the meat #indonesianfood #beefrendang #dinnerideas #easyrecipes

Ayam Penyet is an Indonesian dish made of fried chicken that’s been gently smashed to make it extra tender. The chicken is usually marinated with garlic, turmeric, and spices, then deep-fried until crispy.  Recipe I used: 4 chicken legs or thighs (bone-in for best flavour) 4 cloves garlic 4 shallots 3 candlenuts (or substitute 6–8 cashews) 2 cm galangal 1 tsp ground coriander ½ tsp turmeric powder 1 tsp salt 1 tsp sugar 120 ml water (½ cup) - Blend the garlic, shallots, candlenuts, galangal, coriander, turmeric, salt, sugar, and water into a smooth paste. - ⁠Pour the paste into a wok with 2 tbsp of oil, place chicken into the paste, then fry on medium high heat for 5 minutes. Flipping every minute. Now add in enough water to cover the chicken and simmer for 35-40 minutes, flipping halfway. - ⁠remove the cooked chicken and strain the liquid - ⁠boil it till the volume reduces by half then season to taste with salt Batter: 150 ml of the leftover chicken cooking liquid 80 g rice flour 20 g corn flour ½ tsp baking powder - whisk all the ingredients together, then dip the chicken into this wet batter, coating it well - ⁠deep fry at 180°C or 360°F till golden brown, remember that the chicken is already cooked so you're just crisping up the crust - ⁠serve with rice and sambal/chilli paste Sambal recipe: 6–8 red chilies 5 bird’s eye chilies 3 garlic 3 shallots 1 tomato 1 tsp toasted belacan/shrimp paste 1 tsp sugar Salt + lime juice - dry fry all the ingredients except the sugar salt and lime  - ⁠pound the ingredients together into a rough paste then season with sugar salt and lime juice #ayampenyet #indonesianfood #friedchicken #chickenrecipe #friedchickenrecipe

d: Lemongrass chicken with sugar snaps 🫛🫚 You can find the full written recipe on my Recipe Portal 🙌 Macros per serve: 36g protein 30g fat 68g carbs 684 calories per serve 💪  Ingredients for 3 servings: For the chicken 🍗  5 Chicken Thigh Fillets (Skin-On)  3cm Fresh Ginger 3 Cloves of Garlic 1 Stalk of Lemongrass 1 Tbsp Brown Sugar Small Handful of Coriander 1 Tsp Chilli Flakes 1 Tbsp Dark Soy Sauce 1.5 Tbsp Mayonnaise 1 Tbsp Olive Oil For the sugar snaps 🌶️  200g Sugar Snaps 1 Tsp Chilli Crisp Oil 1/2 Fresh Lime 1 Tbsp Soy Sauce Serve with 🍚  200g Uncooked Rice Cooking instructions 👨‍🍳  Oven: Bake skin-side up at 220°C fan for 35/40 mins until the skin is caramelised and crispy. Air fryer: Cook skin-side up at 200°C for 18/22 mins until crispy. #highprotein #easyrecipes #mealprep #healthyfood #dinnerideas

zh: 牛肋骨咖喱。先收藏，知道你们手头有不少牛肉，万一想做咖喱可以参考！真的超好吃！你们拿到几袋肉？食谱：牛肋骨2公斤（焯水5分钟去腥），水1.3升，姜黄叶1片，柠檬叶6片，月桂叶5片，肉桂一小段，香茅2根，山竹果1个，羊肉香料粉1汤匙（米南加巴斯特产），椰浆120毫升（最后加入）。研磨香料：红辣椒40个，姜黄一节，小米椒15个，南姜半块，生姜半块，石栗6颗，红葱头22颗，大蒜12瓣，香菜粉1汤匙，烤孜然1茶匙。

d: Creamy pasta recipe 🍝✨  1/2 onion 2 cloves fresh garlic 3 tbsp tomato paste 1 1/4 cup heavy cream 1/3 cup shredded mozzarella Salt, pepper, paprika to taste 1 tsp chicken bouillon powder (optional) Parsley In a pan, add oil and fry the onion and garlic until softened. Then add the tomato paste and heavy cream, mix well. Next, add the spices and stir well. Add the pasta and mozzarella cheese. Top with parsley. 👀 Add the mozzarella cheese little by little. I suggest cooking on medium low heat so the cheese melts slowly and the sauce doesn’t get thick. You can also add a little pasta water to help make the sauce extra creamy.  #creamypasta #pasta #easyrecipe
zh: 奶油意大利面食谱。洋葱半个、大蒜2瓣、番茄膏3汤匙、淡奶油1又1/4杯、马苏里拉芝士碎1/3杯、盐胡椒辣椒粉适量、鸡精粉1茶匙（可选）、欧芹适量。锅中加油，炒软洋葱和大蒜，加入番茄膏和淡奶油搅匀，加入调料拌匀，放入意面和马苏里拉芝士，撒上欧芹即可。小贴士：芝士分次加入，建议中小火慢煮让芝士慢慢融化，可加少量

Hot Honey Chicken Pasta 🍯🔥 the viral recipe with over 60+ million views, 20/10 hits every time! Recipe: Chicken Tenders • 1 lb chicken tenderloins • 1 tsp onion powder • 1 tsp garlic powder • 1 tsp seasoned salt • 1 tsp creole seasoning • 1 tsp cayenne pepper (optional, adjust to spice) • 1 tsp all purpose seasoning • 1 sazon packet • 1–2 cups buttermilk • ⅛ cup jalapeño or pickle juice • 3 cups all-purpose flour (season with same seasonings) Hot Honey Sauce • ½ cup buffalo sauce • ¼ cup honey • ⅛ cup hot sauce (optional) Pasta • 1 lb penne pasta • 2 tbsp unsalted butter • 2 garlic cloves, finely minced • ½ yellow onion, finely chopped • 1 ½ cups heavy cream • 1 tsp onion powder • 1 tsp garlic powder • 1 tsp seasoned salt • 1 tsp creole seasoning • 1 tsp cayenne pepper (optional) • 1 tsp all purpose seasoning • 1 tsp black pepper • Grated mozzarella • Grated Parmesan Instructions 1. Season chicken tenderloins add in buttermilk and jalapeño/pickle juice then marinate for at least 30 minutes to an hour.  2. Coat chicken in seasoned flour set aside on wire rack and rest for 10 minutes before frying. Fry at 350°F until golden brown and crispy. Set aside and let cool on a wire rack. 3. In a sauce pan, add 1 tbsp of unsalted butter, buffalo sauce, honey, and hot sauce and simmer until fully combined. Then toss chicken in the hot honey sauce. 4. In a skillet, melt butter and sauté garlic and onion until fragrant. Pour in heavy cream and stir in all seasonings. 5. Add mozzarella and Parmesan until melted and creamy, then toss in cooked pasta. 6. Top creamy pasta with hot honey chicken and extra sauce if desired and enjoy :) #hothoneychickenpasta #hothoney #chickenpasta #pasta #fypシ

Spicy Brazilian-style coconut chicken with tender chicken thighs, creamy coconut sauce, and a hint of lime and cilantro. Comfort food with a tropical twist🥥 I hope you’ll give it a try ❤️ Ingredients (2-3 person) For the Spicy Coconut Chicken •	14 oz/400 g chicken thighs, boneless  •	Salt and freshly cracked black pepper •	Juice of ½ lime •	1 tsp paprika •	chili flakes (adjust to taste) •	0,5 tsp cayenne (adjust to taste) •	olive oil For the Sauce •	1 small onion, chopped •	3 garlic cloves, minced •	1 red bell pepper, sliced •	2 medium sized tomato  chopped  •	1 tbsp tomato paste •	1 can coconut milk / 400 ml / 13.5 oz •	½ tsp turmeric •	1 tsp paprika or smoked paprika for a more smookey flavor  •	0,5 tsp cumin  To Serve •	White or coconut rice •	Lime wedges for garnish •	fresh cilantro, chopped  •	Optional: fresh red chili, for extra heat Instructions 1.	Season the chicken: Mix chicken with lime juice, salt, pepper, paprika, chili flakes, cayenne (optional), and olive oil. Let sit 10-15 min. 2.	Sear the chicken: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken thighs and sear 6-8 min per side until golden. Remove and set aside. 3.	Build the sauce: In the same pan, sauté onion until soft (3-4 min). Add garlic and cook 30 sec. Stir in bell pepper, tomato, tomato paste, and spices, cooking 2-3 min until fragrant. 4.	Add coconut milk: Pour in the full can, stir, and bring to a gentle simmer. Cook a few min until slightly thickened. 5.	Finish the chicken: Return chicken to pan. Simmer 5-10 min or until fully cooked and sauce is creamy. Stir in cilantro. Taste and adjust seasoning or spice. 6.	Serve: Plate chicken with sauce over a generous portion of rice. Garnish with extra cilantro and lime wedges. Enjoy every bite 🫶 #dinnerinspo #easyrecipe #mealinspo #dinnerideas#CapCut

d: Home Cooking Sessions: Thai Beef Salad with the most incredible lemongrass dressing. Full recipe and long-form video now up on Substack, link in bio 🇹🇭😍 - For me, there are very few salads that compare to this one, and a lot of that comes down to the dressing. It’s sharp, sweet, salty and spicy, with layers of heat, citrus and umami that somehow all work together perfectly. It’s incredibly versatile too, so once you make the dressing, you can pair it with all sorts of proteins.  I used lemongrass in both the dressing and butter baste to bring freshness and that really fragrant citrus note through the beef. The toasted rice powder is another key element here - it adds nuttiness, texture and body whilst helping absorb excess moisture so the salad stays crisp. There’s plenty of crushing, grinding and layering of flavours in this one, but if you don’t have a mortar and pestle, a food processor works perfectly well too. Full recipe, ingredients and long-form video now live on Substack, link in bio. NF x

d: แจกสูตร "ผงข้าวผัด" สูตร(ไม่)ลับ รสชาติเป๊ะนัว อร่อยเหมือนเชฟมาผัดให้! #อร่อยบอกต่อ #เคล็ดลับห้องครัว #ข้าวผัด #แจกสูตร #เมนูง่ายๆ  👩🏻‍🍳🥣 ส่วนผสมผงข้าวผัดวิเศษ • ผงรสดีรสหมู: 70 กรัม  • น้ำตาลทรายขาว: 50 กรัม • เกลือป่น: 28 กรัม • ผงกระเทียม: 4 กรัม (แบบไม่ปรุงรส) • พริกไทยป่น: 2 กรัม 🍳 วิธีใช้จริง: ต้องใส่กี่กรัม? • ข้าวผัด 1 จานปกติ : ใช้ประมาณ 1 ช้อนชาสากลปาดเรียบ ไม่ต้องใส่ซีอิ๊วหรือน้ำปลาเพิ่มแล้วนะ รสมันจะนัวเค็มหวานหอมกระเทียมพริกไทยเสร็จสรรพในตัวเลย • ถ้าผัดกระทะใหญ่ (2-3 จาน): ใช้ประมาณ 2 ช้อนชา 💡 ทริคเด็ด: ผสมเสร็จแล้วเขย่าใส่ขวดโหลแห้งๆ ปิดฝาให้สนิท เก็บไว้ใช้ได้เป็นเดือนๆ วันไหนหิวๆ แค่ตั้งกระทะ ผัดไข่ ใส่ข้าว สาดผงนี้ลงไป 1 ช้อนชา จบเลยจ้าา อร่อยเหมือนเชฟมาผัดให้! 🧂💯 ในสูตรผงข้าวผัด จะมีน้ำหนักรวมทั้งหมด 154 กรัม โดยตัวที่มีโซเดียมหลัก ๆ มีดังนี้: • เกลือป่น (28 กรัม): ~11,200 มิลลิกรัม • ผงรสดีรสหมู (70 กรัม): ~11,200 มิลลิกรัม • รวมโซเดียม = 22,400 มิลลิกรัมต่อน้ำหนักรวม 154 กรัม 🥄 ดังนั้น ปริมาณโซเดียมเมื่อตักใช้ 1 ช้อนชาตวงสากล : จะได้รับโซเดียม  581.8 มิลลิกรัมต่อมื้อ 📌 องค์การอนามัยโลก (WHO) แนะนำให้ผู้ใหญ่บริโภคโซเดียม ไม่เกิน 2,000 มิลลิกรัมต่อวัน 👩🏻 คนทั่วไป / ผู้ใหญ่: ไม่เกิน 2,000 มิลลิกรัมต่อวัน (เฉลี่ยไม่เกิน 600-800 มิลลิกรัมต่อมื้อ) 🤒 ผู้ป่วยโรคความดันโลหิตสูง / โรคไต: ควรควบคุมปริมาณไม่เกิน 1,000–1,500 มิลลิกรัมต่อวัน 🧒🏻 เด็ก: ควรได้รับโซเดียมประมาณ 800–1,500 มิลลิกรัมต่อวัน (ขึ้นอยู่กับช่วงอายุ)

d: Real cheeseburger in Tokyo. A halved cheeseburger is placed right on top of bubbling hot cheese sauce on the griddle—an unusual and eye-catching style ✨ Created by a true burger enthusiast who studied burgers around the world, this menu delivers deep cheese flavor while a spicy sauce inside keeps it surprisingly balanced and not too heavy. Clean, satisfying, and easy to enjoy. Sit at the counter and you can watch the entire burger-making process right in front of you, which makes it even more fun. If you’re looking for something a little different during your Tokyo trip, this spot is worth a stop. [American Diner Andra]  - Location: 5-13-7 Higashiueno, Taito City, Tokyo - Hours: 11:30–14:00 / 18:00–22:00 (until 21:00 on weekends) - Menu: Touchdown Burger Triple (¥2,700) #cheeseburger #burger #tokyofood #tokyotravel
zh: 东京正宗芝士汉堡。将对半切开的芝士汉堡直接放在铁板上翻滚的热芝士酱上——造型独特抢眼。由一位走遍世界研究汉堡的真正爱好者创作，芝士味浓郁，内附辣酱保持平衡不腻口。坐在吧台可以全程观看制作过程。东京旅行值得一去。【American Diner Andra】地址：东京台东区东上野5-13-7 / 营业时间：11:30-14:00 / 18:00-22:00（周末至21:00）/ 菜单：Touchdown Burger Triple（2700日元）

d: A standout shoyu ramen spot in Tokyo. Their signature menu is the “Special Shoyu Ramen.” Built on a chicken-based broth blended with multiple soy sauces, the first sip brings out the richness of chicken oil, deep umami from the soy sauce, and a subtle sweetness. As you continue, the flavors finish clean and balanced. The charcoal-grilled chashu adds a gentle smoky aroma that naturally melts into the broth✨ The straight noodles hold the soup well, delivering its flavor all the way through each bite. The chashu comes in a variety of cuts, each prepared differently—from rich, fatty pieces to lighter, more delicate textures—letting you enjoy a contrast of juiciness and mouthfeel. [Ramen Sakurai 麺屋 さくら井] - Location: 2 Chome-15-27 Kamirenjaku, Mitaka, Tokyo, Japan - Hours: Mon & Sat 11:30 - 15:00 / 18:00 - 20:30, Tue/Thu/Fri 11:30 - 15:00, Sun 11:30 - 16:00 (Closed Wed) - Menu: Special Shoyu Ramen (¥2,000) #ramen #tokyoramen #shoyuramen #라멘
zh: 东京一家出色的酱油拉面店。招牌是"特制酱油拉面"，以鸡骨汤为底融合多种酱油，入口感受鸡油浓郁、酱油鲜味与淡淡甜味，尾韵干净平衡。炭烤叉烧带有温和烟熏香气。直面充分挂汤，叉烧部位多样、口感各异。【拉面樱井 麺屋さくら井】地址：东京三鹰市上连雀2-15-27 / 营业时间：周一、六11:30-15:00 / 18:00-20:30，周二/四/五11:30-15:00，周日11:30-16:00（周三休）/ 菜单：特制酱油拉面（2000日元）

d: ป่นไข่ต้ม ส่วนผสม ไข่ต้ม 6 ฟอง หอมแดง 30 กรัม น้ำปลาร้าปรุงรส 55 กรัม น้ำปลา 5 กรัม น้ำตาลทรายไม่ฟอกสี 5 กรัม ผงชูรส 3 กรัม พริกป่น 5 กรัม มะนาว 3-4 ซีก ต้นหอม ผักชี ซอย ผักสด ผักต้มสำหรับจัดเสิร์ฟ วิธีทำ 1. ใส่ไข่เป็ดลงในหม้อ พอเดือดจับเวลาประมาณ 6-7 นาทีพอไข่สุกตักขึ้นพักในน้ำพอเย็นปอกเปลือก เตรียมไว้ 2. ใส่น้ำปลาร้าปรุงรส น้ำตาลทรายไม่ฟอกสี น้ำปลา ผงชูรสบีบ ด้วยมะนาว คนให้เข้ากันโขลกไข่พอแตก ใส่พริกป่น ต้นหอม ผักชี  ให้เข้ากัน ตักใส่ภาชนะโรย ต้นหอม ผักชี จัดเสิร์ฟ ผักสด ผักต้ม #maeban #เมนู #เมนูวันนี้ #ก้นครัว #ห้องครัว #ครัวtiktok #เทรนด์วันนี้ #ป่น#ป่นไข่ต้ม#ไข่ต้ม #อาหารไทย #tiktokพากิน #tiktok #tiktokuni #fypシ #fypシ゚viral #entertainment

zh: 水煮蛋沙拉食谱：原料：水煮蛋6个、红葱头30克、调味鱼露酱30克、鱼露5克、未漂白砂糖5克、味精3克、辣椒粉5克、青柠3-4瓣、葱花、香菜、生蔬菜及水煮蔬菜。做法：1.鸭蛋入锅煮沸后计时6-7分钟，捞起泡冷水后剥壳备用。2.混合调味鱼露酱、砂糖、鱼露、味精，挤入青柠汁搅匀，将蛋捣碎，加入辣椒粉、葱花、香菜拌匀，装盘撒葱花香菜，搭配生熟蔬菜上桌。

d: 1人1杯の蟹を丸ごと堪能する極上蟹コースを紹介します🦀 【かにじぇんぬ 銀座】 ◎活け香住蟹コース 32,000円 活き蟹を目の前で豪快に捌いて1人1杯思う存分に味わえる蟹専門店！ 季節毎に確かな目利きで厳選した高級蟹を楽しめて今回は香住蟹というブランド蟹🦀 専属の職人さんが最初から最後までアテンドしてくれて、お刺身•紹興酒漬け•茹で•焼きなど蟹を余すことなく丸ごと楽しむことができます！ 蟹味噌×蟹身×フカヒレを炊きたての土鍋魔ご飯にかけて食べる〆のご飯が悶絶するほど美味しかったです🤤 冬のシーズンに入荷する松葉蟹も美味しいとのことで寒い季節に食べに行くのも楽しみです！ ごちそうさまでした！！！ ——————————————————— 📍東京都中央区銀座7-13-2 ティアラグレイス銀座タワー 2F 🚃銀座駅徒歩5分 ⏰17:30-23:00 💤水曜 ——————————————————— 【Kanijennu】 A high-class crab specialty store where you can eat live crabs in front of you and eat one bowl per person🦀 Dedicated craftsmen will take care of you from start to finish, so you can enjoy the whole amount of crabs such as sashimi, boiled crab, and grilled crab. ——————————————————— 📍Tiara Grace Ginza Tower 2F, 7-13-2 Ginza, Chuo-ku, Tokyo 🚃5 minutes on foot from Ginza Station ⏰17:30-23:00 💤Wednesday ——————————————————— #tokyofood #tokyogourmet #tokyotrip #japanesefood #japantrip

zh: 介绍银座一人一只螃蟹的顶级蟹套餐。【蟹じぇんぬ 银座】活香住蟹套餐32000日元。职人现场豪快处理活蟹，可享用刺身、绍兴酒腌蟹、水煮、烧烤等各种吃法。最后以蟹膏、蟹肉、鱼翅拌刚煮好的土锅

d: Hot dog coreano 🌭🧀🇰🇷 👉 Massa:  • 1 ovo • 1 xícara de leite • 2 colheres de sopa de açúcar • 2 xícaras de farinha de trigo • 1 pitada de sal (opcional) • 1 colher de sopa de fermento  👉 Empanamento:  • Queijo mussarela • Panko • Palito de churrasco Cozinhe as salsichas antes de espetá-las no palito de churrasco. Você pode cortar o palito ao meio para facilitar na hora de fritar. Enrole duas fatias de queijo mussarela na salsicha e depois passe na massa. Em seguida, empane na panko. Deixei na geladeira por cerca de 10 minutos antes de fritar, mas isso não é obrigatório. Se não quiser consumir tudo na hora, dá para congelar. Só deixe os hot dogs separados uns dos outros para não grudarem. #hotdog #hotdogcoreano #lanche #receitafacil #capcut

d: これは美味しすぎた#和風ハンバーグ#おろしそバーグ ＜材料＞ ▶︎ハンバーグ ・ひき肉…300g ・玉ねぎ…1個 ◎パン粉…大さじ4 ◎牛乳…大さじ1 ◎塩麹…大さじ1 ◎卵…1個 ・大根おろし…お好み量 ▶︎タレ ・玉ねぎ…1/3(ハンバーグの具材の残り） ・醤油…大さじ1 ・お酒…大さじ1 ・みりん…大さじ1 ・お酢…大さじ1 ・ハチミツ…大さじ1 ＜作り方＞ 1.玉ねぎを細かくみじん切りにする 2.合い挽き肉にみじん切りにした玉ねぎを2/3と◎の材料を入れ、白っぽくなるまで捏ねる 3.手にオリーブオイルを塗り空気を抜きながら成形したら冷蔵庫で15分冷やす 4.熱したフライパンで焼き、焼き目が付いたら裏返し水を少々加え蓋をして4-5分蒸し焼き 5.ヘラで軽く押して、赤い肉汁が出てこなければオッケー 6.ハンバーグを取り出し、残った玉ねぎと調味料を加え煮詰めればタレ完成
h: 和風ハンバーグ, おろしそバーグ

d: World Championship Pad Krapao 🌶️  Kaprao Ingredients - 20g garlic, chopped (6-7 cloves) - authentic spicy → 28g bird’s eye chili, chopped (roughly 8-10 peppers) - medium spicy → 12g bird’s eye chili, chopped (roughly 3-4 peppers) - 2tbsp (or more) neutral oil - 1lb 80/20 ground beef - 1 egg (for frying) - 12g fish sauce (roughly 2-3 tsp) - 12g oyster sauce (roughly 2-3 tsp) - 12g light soy sauce (roughly 2-3 tsp) - 12g dark soy sauce (roughly 2-3 tsp) - 4g sugar (roughly 1 tsp) - 2g msg (roughly 1/2 tsp) - 2g white pepper (roughly 1/2 tsp) - 15-20 basil leaves, de-stemmed - 3-4 mint leaves - pinch of clove Kaprao Steps - add the garlic and roughly 2/3 of the chili (choose your spice level) to a mortar and pestle and pound until it forms a chunky paste - heat up a pan over medium-high heat until water droplets bead across the surface - add neutral oil and wait for it to start shimmering, then crack an egg into the pan and let it fry until the edges are crispy. Tilt the pan and spoon over some of the hot oil to set the yolk. Remove the egg and set it aside. - add ground beef and cook until all the water has evaporated, once the water has evaporated, keep cooking until it begins to fry in its own fat (you’ll know when the sound changes to a crispy crackling sound) - add the chili-garlic paste to the beef and cook until you feel like sneezing AND when the beef starts sticking and forming a fond at the bottom of the pan - deglaze/season with fish sauce, oyster sauce, light soy sauce, dark soy sauce, sugar, msg, and white pepper. stir to combine - finish with the basil leaves, mint, and pinch of clove. continue cooking until the leaves are wilted. - serve with a side of rice, nam prik pla sauce, and the fried egg on top. Nam Prik Pla Ingredients (side sauce shown in video) - 40g fish sauce - 20g lime - 10g garlic - 12g bird’s eye chili - 2g sugar Nam Prik Steps - Combine ingredients together in a bowl, that’s all. #cooking #food #foodtiktok #thaifood #Recipe

d: Oxtail Thai Beef Noodle Soup Instant Pot Recipe.  Recipe: Ingredients 📝 Thin Soy Sauce (1 Tbsp) Thick Soy Sauce (1 Tbsp) Seasoning Soy Sauce (1/4 Cup) Rock Sugar (3 Big Pieces)  Beef Paste (20 oz) Fish Sauce (1/4 Cup) Cilantro Stem or Roots Galangal (2 Thinly Pieces) Chicken Bouillon (1/4 Cup) Star Anise (4 pieces)  Cinnamon Sticks (1-2 sticks) Fennel (1/4 Tsp) Cloves (1/4 Tsp) Peppercorn (1/2 Tsp) Garlic Cloves (6 Minced) Bay Leaves (2 pieces) Sugar (1/4 of a Cup) * Soak Rice Noodles in Cold Water.  * Toast Spices, Star Anise, Cinnamon Sticks, Fennel, Cloves, Peppercorn, Garlic Cloves and Bay Leaves. Place in Cheesecloth or in a Tea Bag.  Instructions 📝 1. Add Meat to Instant Pot. *Your Choice of Beef (2 Lbs) 🥩. I used Oxtail. You can substitute with Beef Chuck Roast, Beef Short Ribs, and Beef Back Ribs. 2. Next Add Aromatic Spice Bag (Spices from Cheesecloth or Spice Ball) Cilantro Stems, Galangal, Garlic, and Rock Sugar to Instant Pot 3. Add Seasoning Ingredients (Listed About). Then Fill Water to the Max Line. (My Instant Pot Size is 8-Qt Quarts).  4. Close and Lock in Lid. - Select the Pressure Cook Button and set at 1:20 Mins.  - If Meat is Thawed Pressure Cook for 45 Mins instead.  5. Prep Toppings and Garnishes. Once timer goes off. Press down on the Quick Release Knob and Lock it down to release Steam.  6. Open Lid. Add Beef Meatballs. I Ran out of Character Limits allowed on here. Head over to My YouTube Channel for the Full Written Recipe (Link on My Profile, Scroll down to how to make Thai Beef Noodle Soup). Save this Video for Later. Or tag 🏷️ a friend who you want to Make Thai Oxtail Beef Noodle Soup with. Don’t forget Hit that Follow Button to enjoy over 200+ Plus Recipes. zh: 即热锅泰式牛尾牛肉汤面食谱：食材包括薄酱油、浓酱油、调味酱油、冰糖、牛肉酱、鱼露、香菜根、南姜、鸡精、八角、肉桂棒、茴香、丁香、花椒、蒜瓣、月桂叶、糖；将香料烘烤后包入纱布，与牛肉、调料一同放入即热锅，高压烹饪1小时20分钟（解冻肉则45分钟），加入牛肉丸后出锅；完整食谱请访问YouTube频道

CRAB RANGOON NACHOS  Recipe by: @Irene Choi  8 oz cream cheese, softened 8 oz imitation crab, shredded and chopped 1 tsp soy sauce 1 tsp sugar 1 tsp garlic powder 1 tsp white pepper 1 tsp worceshire sauce 1-2 chopped scallion 4 minced garlic Wonton wrappers   ADDITIONAL INGREDIENTS Gochujang crema: 1 part gochujang + 3 or 4 part Mexican crema Sweet chili sauce Chili oil Furikake Jalapenos or serrano Scallion     1. Combine cream cheese, imitation crab, soy sauce, sugar, garlic powder, white pepper, worceshire sauce, chopped scallion and minced garlic. 2. Assemble your nachos with wonton wrappers and crab Rangoon filling (Watch video for clarification). Apply water to the edge and press to seal shut. 3. Then fry until golden brown. 4. For the topping, make gochujang crema. 5. Assemble: nachos, gochujang crema, sweet chili sauce, chili oil, furikake, chopped jalapenos, and scallion for garnish.     Gochujang crema: 1 part gochujang + 3 or 4 part Mexican crema Sweet chili sauce Chili oil Furikake Jalapenos or serrano Scallion

鶏むね肉で作るスパイシーチキン🔥 暑い日に無性に食べたくなって作ったのですが、 娘も「うまいっ！」と大喜び🙌 白飯が進んでいました🍚😁 仕上げの一味唐辛子は、七味や山椒粉もおすすめ◎ 熱々でキンキンをどうぞ🍺 ✏︎レシピ▼ 〜スパイシーチキン〜 【材料（2人分）】調理時間:15分（漬ける時間を除く） ・鶏胸肉……1枚（350〜400g） ・米油（またはサラダ油）……適量 ・片栗粉……大さじ3〜4 ・一味唐辛子……適量 a. しょうゆ・酒……各大さじ1 a. 顆粒コンソメ……小さじ1 a.豆板醤……小さじ1〜2 a. おろしにんにく……小さじ2 【作り方】 1. 鶏むね肉は、キッチンペーパーで表面の水気を除く。全体にフォークを刺し、スティック状に切る。 2. 1をボウルに入れて（a）を加えて混ぜ合わせる。冷蔵庫で20分ほど置く。 3. 2を取り出して片栗粉を加えてよく混ぜ合わせる。 4. フライパンに米油（またはサラダ油）を1cmほどの高さまで注ぎ、中火で熱する。2を入れて中弱火にし、途中で返しながら4分ほど揚げる。表面がカリッとこんがり色づいたら取り出して油をきり、お好みで一味唐辛子をふる。 ⸻ ⸻ ⸻⸻ ⸻ ⸻ ⸻ ⸻ ポイント💬 ・下味の豆板醤は表記の分量を目安に、辛さを調整してください。 ・しっかりめの味付けで、お酒のおつまみにもぴったりです。 ・仕上げにかける七味唐辛子は、一味唐辛子や粉山椒などもおすすめです。 ・片栗粉は全体にしっかり混ぜ合わせることで、衣にも下味がなじみ、しっかり味に仕上がります。 ⸻ ⸻ ⸻⸻ ⸻ ⸻ ⸻ ⸻ #鶏むね肉レシピ#スパイシーチキン #簡単レシピ#レシピ#おつまみレシピ

d: Recipe⤵️ Would you eat this? Honey Sesame Chicken Ingredients: For the Chicken: 1 chicken breast, cubed ½ tsp salt ½ tsp black pepper ½ tsp nutritional yeast ½ tsp baking powder 1 egg 2 tbsp cold water 1 tbsp avocado oil 2 tbsp cornstarch 2 tbsp flour (I used gluten-free) For the Sauce: ½ tbsp avocado oil 2 cloves garlic, minced 2 tbsp honey 2 tbsp soy sauce 1 tbsp ketchup ½ tbsp rice vinegar ½ tbsp toasted sesame oil 1 tbsp sesame seeds ¼ cup water + 1 cornstarch, mixed Green onions, chopped, for topping Directions: For the Chicken: In a bowl, combine the chicken, salt, black pepper, nutritional yeast, and baking powder In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, water, avocado oil, cornstarch, and flour Pour the egg mixture over the chicken and let sit for 10-15 minutes Heat 2-3 inches of oil to 350 F, then fry the chicken pieces until at least 165 F at the thickest part Remove the chicken from the oil, then place on a paper towel to absorb excess oil For the Sauce: In a bowl, combine the honey, soy sauce, ketchup, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and sesame seeds In a wok or high-sided pan on medium-low heat, warm the oil, then cook the garlic until fragrant, around 1-2 minutes Add in the sauce mixture and the cornstarch and water mixture, then mix until thickened Remove from the heat and add in the chicken pieces; mix and serve topped with green onions Enjoy!! #sesamechicken #chinesefood #trendingfoods #viralrecipes

d: FAJITA CHICKEN FLATBREAD #food #recipe  DOUGH 200 g all-purpose flour 3.5 g salt (½ tsp) 8 g honey 100 ml water CHICKEN MIXTURE 30 ml olive oil 500 g chicken breast, in strips 4 g ground cumin (1⅓ tsp) 2 g cayenne pepper (⅔ tsp) 2 g paprika  (⅔ tsp) 0.5 chicken stock cube  75 g yellow onion, half rings	 2 garlic cloves 50 g red bell pepper, in strips 50 g yellow bell pepper, in strips 50 g green bell pepper, in strips 5 g cornstarch 70 ml water 75 g cheddar cheese, grated EXTRA sliced cheese sunflower oil, for frying Prepare all ingredients. Mix the cornstarch with the water in a small bowl and set aside. Place the flour, salt, honey, and water in a large bowl. Knead the dough for 10–12 minutes until smooth. Cover and let it rest for 10 minutes. Heat the olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Add the chicken, cumin, cayenne pepper, paprika, and crumbled stock cube. Cook for 4–5 minutes. Add the yellow onion, garlic, and bell peppers. Stir-fry for 2–3 minutes until the vegetables soften slightly. Pour in the cornstarch mixture and cook until the mixture thickens. Add the grated cheddar cheese and stir well until the cheese has melted. Let the chicken mixture cool. Divide the dough into 6 equal pieces and shape them into balls. Take a ball and roll out into a circle. Place a slice of cheese on one half of the dough and spread some of the chicken fajita filling on top. Add an extra slice of cheese if desired. Lightly moisten the edges with water. Fold the dough and press the edges to seal. Place the filled dough on a sheet of parchment paper and repeat with the rest. Heat a heavy-bottomed frying pan with a little oil. Cook the breads over medium heat on both sides until golden brown and fully cooked.

d: Another week, another cabbage rolls version😃 This time I made Asian-style napa cabbage rolls and they turned out so good👍🏻 Save this recipe for later☺️ Asian-style napa cabbage rolls Ingredients: • Napa cabbage leaves - 10-12 leaves • Eggplant - 1 medium • Mushrooms - 16 oz (450 g) • Jasmine rice, cooked - 1 cup (190 g) • Green onions - 3 • Garlic - 4 cloves • Freshly grated ginger - 1 tbsp • Soy sauce - 1 1/2 tbsp • Maple syrup or agave - 1 tsp • Rice vinegar - 1 tsp • Sesame oil - 1-2 tsp • Neutral oil - for cooking For the sauce: • Vegetable broth - 1 cup (240 ml) • Soy sauce - 5 tbsp • Maple syrup - 1 tbsp • Rice vinegar - 2 tsp • Sesame oil - 1-1 1/2 tsp • Dried ginger - 1/8 tsp • Cornstarch - 2 tsp • Water - 2 tbsp (30 ml) How to make: 1. Simmer the napa cabbage leaves for about 1 minute until softened. 2. Cook finely diced eggplant in a pan with a little oil for 8-10 minutes until soft and lightly golden. Transfer to a plate. 3. In the same pan, cook the mushrooms until all excess moisture evaporates and they start to brown. Add garlic, ginger, and green onions. Cook for 1 more minute. 4. Add the eggplant back in along with the soy sauce, maple syrup, and rice vinegar. Cook for another 1-2 minutes, then fold in the rice. 5. Fill each cabbage leaf, fold in the sides, and roll tightly. 6. Pan-sear the rolls seam-side down until golden on multiple sides. 7. For the sauce, simmer broth, soy sauce, maple syrup, rice vinegar, sesame oil, and dried ginger for 1-2 minutes. Stir in the cornstarch mixed with water and cook until glossy. 8. Pour the sauce over the cabbage rolls and top with green onions and sesame seeds. #cabbagerolls #asianfood #napacabbage #vegancabbagerolls #napacabbagerolls

d: #ล่ามิชลินกินของอร่อย นครปฐม 2026 EP.2 “ร้านกับข้าว ชาวประมง“ สาขา ศาลายา  ร้านอาหารทะเล อาหารชาวประมงพื้นบ้านอ่างศิลา ใช้วัตถุดิบจากเรือประมงเล็ก เข้ามาสดใหม่ทุกวัน  เสน่ห์ขอาหารทะเลของที่ร้านจะลดรสชาติอร่อยรสจัดแบบบ้านๆ ความพิเศษจะอยู่ที่เมนูเล่มสีเขียวจะเป็นเมนูวัตถุดิบตามฤดูกาล ซึ่งบางวัตถุดิบจะไม่ได้มีเสิร์ฟทุกวัน หรือชนิดของปลาที่ได้มา ก็จะแตกต่าง ในแต่ละวันเช่นกัน ผมมาทานที่สาขาเลียบคลองทวีวัฒนา ศาลายา ตอนนี้ร้านจะมีอยู่ 3 สาขา   -สาขาโฮมโปร พุทธมณฑล สาย4 -สาขาบางพลี -และสาขาที่จะเปิดใหม่ สาขานวมินทร์ 26 (เปิดวันที่ 15 มิถุนายน 2569) ใกล้ที่ไหนตามมามาทานอาหารทะเลสดๆกันได้เลยครับ สาขาที่ผมมาทาน เปิดทุกวัน  10:30-21:00 น. #นครปฐม  #Tiktokพากิน  #เทรนด์วันนี้  #seafood

d: Spotted a new food spot in Legazpi Village, Makati, and I had to check it out! 🌮✨ I visited Los Chachos Fil-Mex Kusina and got to try their Quesabirria with Consome, Quesadilla, and their NEW Chocolate Horchata. 🤤 The Quesabirria was packed with flavor, the consome added the perfect finishing touch, and the Chocolate Horchata was a refreshing twist that definitely stood out. If you’re craving authentic Fil-Mex flavors, this is a spot worth adding to your list! 📍 Here are their other Los Chachos branches: • Ortigas Carpark, Sapphire Road, Pasig City • Legazpi Village, Makati City • AllianceLand Tower, Paseo de Roxas, Makati City • SM Mall of Asia – 3rd Floor, North Wing, Entertainment Mall • SM North EDSA – 2nd Floor, North Towers • SM City Fairview – Lower Ground, Parkway Which one would you try first? 👀🌮 #LosChachos #LosChachosPH #FilMexKusina #Quesabirria #Quesadilla

d: 🇵🇭 Pork Adobo | Filipino Food Bible – Episode 1 My take on one of the most iconic Filipino dishes - Pork Adobo! This series will feature all filipino dishes in all their variations. consider this your guide to filipino cuisine. comment what you wanna see next! INGREDIENTS: Pork Adobo - 1.2 kg pork belly (or cut of choice) - 15–20 cloves garlic, minced (adjust to taste—more is always welcome) - 1 onion, chopped - 500 ml pork broth - 190 ml soy sauce - 100 ml cane vinegar - 3 long green chilies - 4 bay leaves - 1 tbsp whole peppercorns - 30 g palm sugar, chopped (adjust to sweetness) - Oil, for frying Toppings - Sliced onion leeks - Crispy garlic bits - Boiled eggs INSTRUCTIONS - Fry the pork until lightly browned on all sides, then remove and set aside. - In the same pot, sauté the garlic until lightly golden and fragrant. Add onions and cook until softened. - Return the pork to the pot, pour in the pork broth. Add the soy sauce, vinegar, green chilies, bay leaves, peppercorns, and palm sugar.  - Cover and let simmer on medium heat for 5-10 mins **don’t mix to allow vinegar to cook.  - Turn to low heat for 1–2 hours, until the pork is tender and the sauce has reduced. you want it to be almost swimming in its own fat like a confit - Optional: If serving with eggs, add the soft boiled eggs 2-3 mins before serving to retain jammyness - Serve over hot rice, topped with crispy garlic and leeks, and a hard-boiled egg on the side. Enjoy. #FilipinoFoodBible #filipinofood #asmr #cookingasmr #pinoyfood
zh: 猪肉阿斗波——菲律宾美食圣经第1集。食材：猪五花、大蒜、洋葱、猪肉汤、酱油、甘蔗醋、青辣椒、月桂叶、黑胡椒、棕榈糖。做法：煎肉、炒蒜葱、加入所有调料小火炖1至2小时至软烂，配米饭、脆

d: 🇵🇭 Pork Binagoongan | Filipino Food Bible Ep. 11 One of the more underrated but S tier Filipino dishes!! Usually made with pork simmered in “bagoong alamang”, or fermented shrimp paste - best served with rice, sometimes with eggplant or green mango on the side. Its savory, funky, and slightly sweet, with tons of umami 💡Pro tip: adjust depending on your bagoong. Not all bagoong tastes the same — some are saltier, milder, or sweeter — so taste as you go and balance it out with sugar, vinegar, and tomatoes. INGREDIENTS: Binagoongan: - 1.5 kg pork ribs, blanched (you can use pork belly or cut of choice) - 5-6 tbsp bagoong guisado - 1 large onion, diced - 15-20 cloves garlic, sliced - 4 long green chilies, sliced - 350g tomatoes, sliced - 1/3 cup cane vinegar - 1/3 cup brown sugar - 1/4 cup soy sauce - Water as needed - Black pepper, to taste Bagoong Guisado: - 400g shrimp paste (alamang) - 25-30 cloves garlic - 7-10 red chilies - 6-7 shallots - 400g tomatoes, diced - 1/4 cup vinegar - 1/3 cup brown sugar Ensaladang Mangga: - Green mango - Red onion - Cilantro - Tomato - Lime - Salt - Pepper INSTRUCTIONS:  - Blanch pork for 10 minutes, before straining and rinsing. Set aside. - To make the bagoong start by blitzing onions or shallots, garlic, and red chilies in a processor.  Add to cold pan with oil and cook until garlic is slightly oasted add tomatoes, alamang, sugar and vinegar. Allow this to simmer until the oil comes out and the tomatoes are jammy. - For the binagoongan start by sauteing onions, garlic, and chilies. add back your meat and all other ingredients listed under  “Binagoongan” and simmer for 40mins-1hr or until tender - In the meantime you can pair this with a fresh ensalada by combining all ingredients under “ensalada”. - Serve and enjoy! #CookingASMR #ASMR #FilipinoFood #pinoyfood

d: 🇵🇭 Kare Kare | Filipino Food Bible Ep. 10 Kare-kare is a rich Filipino stew made with oxtail, tripe, and vegetables, all simmered in a thick peanut sauce. It’s usually served with bagoong (fermented shrimp paste) on the side to balance the flavors and an extra level of umami and saltiness 😋 INGREDIENTS: Boiling liquid: - 1-2 red onions, chopped - 2 bulbs of garlic, chopped - 1 tbsp of salt - 1 tbsp peppercorns - 5-6 bay leaves - 1 kg of oxtail - 650g of ox tripe - Beef stock as needed Kare Kare: - 10g of annatto powder - 2 tablespoons oil - 15-20 cloves garlic, minced - 2 tbsp annatto powder - 1 white onion, diced - 1 banana heart, chopped, washed and rinsed w/ salt - Beef stock as needed - green beans, chopped - eggplants, quartered - pechay/bok choy - 1 ½ cup peanut butter - Patis to taste - ½ teaspoon salt - 1 tbsp of sugar (optional to taste) Toasted rice slurry: - 1:5 tbsp of water to toasted rice, blended Served with:  - Bagoong  - Crushed peanuts INSTRUCTIONS:  - Start by seasoning your meat with salt and pepper and sear. Add all ingredients under “boiling liquid” and fill the pot as needed with beef stock. Simmer until tender, remove meat and set aside the broth for later.  - Saute onions, garlic, and banana hearts in oil mixed with annatto powder. Add your meat back and cover with the broth from the boiling liquid and simmer for 15-20 minutes. - To thicken the mixture, add toasted rice to a food processor or blender. Take some of the rice and mix with water to form our slurry.  - Add both rice slurry and peanut butter stir and reduce to thicken. Season with patis/salt/pepper and add your vegetables.  - Serve alongside bagoong top and enjoy!  #CookingASMR #ASMR #FilipinoFood #PinoyFood

Then turn off the stove before adding in the jelly powder immediately and stir.  •Make sure to bring water to a full boiling before adding in the sago(mini tapioca pearl). d: Filipino Pork Adobo 🤎 Ingredients: * 2 lbs pork shoulder, cut into cubes * 2 tbsp oil * 1 large onion, sliced * 8 cloves garlic, sliced * 3 cups water * 1/2 cup soy sauce * 1 1/2 tsp dark soy sauce * 1/4 cup rice vinegar * 3 tbsp brown sugar * 1 1/2 tsp black peppercorns * 5 bay leaves * Pineapple chunks * Green onion + rice for serving Instructions: 1. Heat oil and sear pork until browned on all sides. Remove and set aside. 2. In the same pot, sauté onion for 2 minutes, then add garlic and cook until fragrant. 3. Add water, soy sauces, vinegar, brown sugar, peppercorns, and bay leaves. Stir well. 4. Return pork to the pot with all the juices. Bring to a boil, then lower heat and simmer partially covered for 1 1/2 hours until the pork is fall-apart tender. 5. While simmering, caramelize pineapple chunks in a pan until golden on both sides. 6. Remove pork from the pot and boil the sauce over high heat for 7–10 minutes until slightly reduced. 7. Add pork and pineapple back into the sauce and toss gently to coat. 8. Serve over jasmine rice and top with green onions. Sweet, savory, tangy, and so comforting 🤍  #food #foodie #homecook #recipesoftiktok

d: 🇵🇭 Suam na Mais (Filipino Corn Soup) | Soups So Good It Can Cure Any Sickness Ep. 28 Suam na mais is a  Filipino corn soup with roots in Pampanga - a province in the 🇵🇭. It’s usually made w/ white corn (malagkit na mais). My grandmother used to make this when I was younger so this holds a special place in my ❤️ It’s honestly one of the tastiest and most comforting soups I’ve ever had and it’s kinda reminiscent of a thin porridge as well 😋 INGREDIENTS:  Shrimp/Chicken Stock: - 1 kg of shrimp shells - Chicken stock as needed Suam na Mais  - 1 kg of prawn/shrimp - 8 pcs white corn, chopped and half grated - 10-15 cloves of garlic, chopped  - 1 white onion, chopped - ½ kilo chicken cuts - Shrimp/Chicken broth as needed - 1 tbsp of patis - 3-5 pcs long green chilies - ½ cup of malunggay leaves - salt and pepper to taste *measurements are just estimates. Taste and adjust w your ❤️ INSTRUCTIONS:  - remove and chop corn kernels. grate half including the cob. The natural starch will help thicken the broth. - Make a simple shrimp-chicken stock by simmering shrimp shells. Sear the shrimp meat separately. - sauté garlic and onions. Add the chicken pieces, then pour in the prepared stock. Season with fish sauce and add the reserved corn cobs. simmer for 20–30 minutes, then remove the cobs. - Add the shrimp, along with the grated and chopped corn and allow to thicken. add chilies and malunggay off heat - Serve hot and enjoy! #CookingASMR #ASMR #Soups #filipinofood #pinoyfood

For the Culture 🇵🇭 Filipino Yema Balls! Ingredients 2 tbsp unsalted butter 1 10-oz can condensed milk 3 pieces egg yolks from large eggs pinch salt sugar for coating oil or baking spray for greasing Instructions Melt butter in a pan on low heat. Add condensed milk and stir until combined. Add egg yolks and a pinch of salt. Stir until the mixture thickens considerably (about 20 minutes). Transfer mixture into a slightly greased plate or clean surface. Allow to cool completely. Scoop a teaspoon of the yema mixture and form into a ball. Coat with sugar and serve. #groarkboysbbq #themeatteacher #yemaballs
zh: 菲律宾文化美食——椰奶蛋黄球！食材：无盐黄油2汤匙、炼乳1罐（10盎司）、大鸡蛋蛋黄3个、少许盐、裹糖用细砂糖、食用油或烤盘喷雾。做法：低火融化黄油，加入炼乳搅拌均匀，加入蛋黄和少许盐，持续搅拌至混合物明显变稠（约20分钟），倒入抹油的盘中冷却，取一茶匙量搓成球形，裹上糖即可享用。

d: the woman who made the video sent me this: “Taho is a Filipino staple. Usually a food vendor would walk around the neighborhood calling out "Taho!". It is based on a Chinese tofu recipe that eventually was reimagined for Filipino taste buds. Back in the day when you heard the vendor call out, you bring your own cup or glass for them to fill.” yummy.
zh: 视频作者给我发来消息："Taho（豆花）是菲律宾的日常小吃，通常由小贩沿街叫卖'Taho！'。它源自中式豆腐做法，后来改良成适合菲律宾人口味的版本。以前听到小贩叫卖声，大家会自带杯子或玻璃杯去盛。"真好吃。

Want Pinoy food that lasts in your fridge that's NOT adobo? Try this recipe. 🔥  This version of estofado traces back to a 1935 cookbook, and the cooking process tells a story. In a time before refrigeration, it was made to last, feeding families for days. Every bite offers a glimpse into how people once cooked with care, preserving both flavor and longevity through thoughtful techniques and ingredients. 👩🏻‍🍳  ESTOFADONG FILIPINO From the book: 1935 Libro nin Pagluto asin Pagconserva Ingredients: 1 kilo of meat (usually beef or pork) 1 cup vinegar 2 onions 5 saba bananas (ripe plantains) 2 glasses of water 1 cup sugar 1 head of garlic 1 small glass (copita) of gin (Ginebra) Procedure: 1. Fry the meat until browned. Set aside the fried meat, this will be used for the stew. 2. In a separate pot or pan, caramelize the sugar by heating it with a bit of vinegar. 3. Once the sugar has melted and slightly caramelized, add the remaining vinegar and water. Stir and cook until the mixture resembles a broth. 4. While it's simmering, prepare a pot (koron) by lining the bottom with banana leaves or any barrier to prevent the meat from sticking or burning. 5. Place the fried meat into the pot, along with all the ingredients: chopped onions, garlic, sliced saba bananas, and the prepared broth. Also, add the gin at this stage. 6. Cover the meat with banana leaves to seal in moisture and flavor. 7. Cook over low heat, and once it starts boiling, reduce the fire further and let it slowly cook until the meat is tender. 8. Once done, this dish can be preserved for up to a month, and reheated only when ready to serve. #fyp #featrmedia #filipinofood #estofado

Ginataang Kuhol/ Suso/ Escargot (Apple Snails in Coconut Milk) Ingredients - 500g Kuhol - 500g Gata (Coconut Milk/ Cream) - 4 cloves garlic - 1 onion - 3 thumbs ginger - Cooking oil - Bunch of Chinese Kangkong (Water Spinach) - 3pcs Siling Haba - 2pcs Siling Labuyo - 2tbsp fish sauce - Salt Directions 1. Soak the Kuhol overnight in salt and water mixture. 2. Cut the tip of kuhol and wash repeatedly until water is clear. 3. Saute the garlic, onion and ginger. 4. Add the coconut milk and siling haba. Mix and let it simmer for 2 minutes. 5. Add the Kuhol and fish sauce. Simmer for 10 minutes 6. Add siling haba, siling labuyo and salt then mix well. Let it simmer for 5 minutes 7. Add and mix the kangkong and serve. #FilipinoFood #Exoticfood #Exotic
zh: 椰奶田螺/蜗牛/法式蜗牛（苹果螺椰奶炖）食材：500克田螺、500克椰浆、4瓣大蒜、1个洋葱、3段生姜、食用油、一把空心菜、3根长青椒、2根小辣椒、2汤匙鱼露、盐。做法：1.田螺用盐水浸泡一夜。2.剪去螺尾，反复清洗至水清。3.爆香蒜、洋葱、姜。4.加椰浆和长青椒，搅匀小火煮2分钟。5.加入田螺和鱼露，炖10分钟。6.加长青椒、小辣椒和盐，拌匀再炖5分钟。7.加入空心菜拌匀即可上桌。

Espasol is one of those snacks that always reminds you of your childhood. ❤️  Soft, chewy, and coated in toasted rice flour, it has that lightly nutty flavor that keeps you reaching for another piece. It's the kind of kakanin that feels comforting the moment you take a bite. Catch more food stories from our Laguna series on YouTube. 🔥  ESPASOL Ingredients: 16 oz glutinous rice flour 2 cans coconut milk 1 can evaporated milk 1 can condensed milk pinch salt macapuno Procedure: 1. Toast the glutinous rice flour in a large pan or wok on medium-high heat and stir frequently so it doesn’t burn. Once it turns a light shade of brown and becomes aromatic, remove from heat. Set aside about ½ cup toasted flour to coat the bottom of your pan. 2. In a large bowl, add all ingredients, including the rest of the toasted flour and stir until incorporated. Transfer back to the pan and bring to a boil.  3. Lower heat to medium-low and stir until the mixture forms into a ball.  4. Once the mixture is smooth and shiny, remove from heat and transfer to the prepared pan. Spread evenly. 5. Sprinkle the rest of the toasted flour and make sure to coat the full surface. Slice and serve! #fyp #featrmedia #filipinofood #laguna #espasol
zh: Espasol是那种总让你想起童年的零食。软糯、有嚼劲，裹着烤糯米粉，带着淡淡的坚果香，让你忍不住一块接一块。这款卡卡宁（传统糕点）一口下去就让人感到温暖。更多拉古纳系列美食故事请到YouTube收看。Espasol食谱：糯米粉16盎司、椰奶2罐、淡奶1罐、炼乳1罐、少许盐、椰果。做法：1.用中大火在锅中翻炒糯米粉至浅棕色并飘出香气，离火备用，留约半杯用于铺底。2.将所有食材连同剩余烤粉倒入大碗拌匀，倒回锅中煮沸。3.转中小火搅拌至成团。4.待混合物光滑有光泽后离火，倒入备好的平底锅铺平。5.撒上剩余烤粉，确保全面覆盖，切片即可享用。

d: Nakagawa ka na ba ng kakanin rolls? 👀 Ube, langka, at homemade langka latik… sobrang lambot, chewy, at legit na panalo sa gata.  ✨ Ingredients ✨ Ube Layer: - 1 cup glutinous rice flour - 1 cup coconut milk - 1/3 cup white sugar - 1/2 cup ube halaya - 1/2 tsp ube extract - 1/8 tsp salt Langka Layer: - 1 cup glutinous rice flour - 1 cup coconut milk - 1/4 cup langka syrup - 1/4 cup white sugar - 1/8 tsp salt - yellow food coloring - chopped langka Filling: -  Chopped langka  Langka Latik: - 1 cup coconut cream - 2 tbsp langka syrup - 1/4 cup brown sugar - pinch of salt - chopped langka #kakanin #ube #langka #latik #filipinofood
zh: 你试过做卡卡宁卷吗？紫芋、菠萝蜜加自制菠萝蜜Latik……超级软糯、有嚼劲，椰香十足，真的绝了。食材——紫芋层：糯米粉1杯、椰奶1杯、白糖⅓杯、紫芋泥½杯、紫芋精华½茶匙、盐⅛茶匙。菠萝蜜层：糯米粉1杯、椰奶1杯、菠萝蜜糖浆¼杯、白糖¼杯、盐⅛茶匙、黄色食用色素、菠萝蜜碎。馅料：菠萝蜜碎。菠萝蜜Latik：椰浆1杯、菠萝蜜糖浆2汤匙、红糖¼杯、少许盐、菠萝蜜碎。
